LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Picus_Child.title: 善于观察的青年
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Silus_Adult.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 作为 Frumentarius 运作，直到 [PAWN_possessive] 被 NCR 捕获。 [PAWN_pronoun] 现在被关押在麦卡伦营，在保持对凯撒忠诚的同时面临审讯。 [PAWN_nameDef] 知道的太多，不能轻易放弃。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Silus_Adult.title: 被俘的间谍
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Silus_Child.description: [PAWN_nameDef]很早就知道谎言和误导可以像武器一样有效。 [PAWN_pronoun] 练习假设不同的角色并隐藏 [PAWN_possessive] 真实本性。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Silus_Child.title: 骗人的孩子
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Aurelius_Adult.d: [PAWN_nameDef] 通过在战斗中的英勇行为赢得了百夫长的军衔。 [PAWN_pronoun]指挥百年军团，负责平定菲尼克斯地区。 [PAWN_pronoun] 是一位熟练的战术家，因在前线指挥而受到 [PAWN_possessive] 部队的尊重。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Aurelius_Child.d: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生在军团领地，并按照凯撒严格的准则长大。 [PAWN_pronoun] 在军事训练中表现出色，从小就表现出天生的领导能力。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Caesar_Adult.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 在被黑脚部落俘虏后成立了凯撒军团。利用[PAWN_possessive]罗马历史和战术知识，[PAWN_pronoun]将数十个部落团结在一面旗帜下。 [PAWN_pronoun] 是一位出色的战略家和魅力十足的领导者，尽管 [PAWN_pronoun] 患有导致周期性无力的脑瘤。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Caesar_Child.des: Born Edward Sallow, [PAWN_nameDef] was raised by the Followers of the Apocalypse after [PAWN_possessive] parents died. [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] youth studying history, linguistics, and philosophy in the Boneyard, developing a sharp intellect and an obsession with 古老 Rome.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Lanius_Adult.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 被称为东方怪物，成为凯撒最令人畏惧的军事指挥官。在因怯懦而亲自处决了 [PAWN_possessive] 整个部落后，[PAWN_pronoun] 加入了军团，并因 [PAWN_possessive] 的残暴和不可阻挡的战斗能力而成为传奇。 [PAWN_pronoun] 从前线指挥，通过纯粹的暴力打破敌人的防线。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Lanius_Child.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生于科罗拉多河以东蛮荒之地的 Hidebarks 部落。作为一个年轻人，[PAWN_pronoun]目睹了[PAWN_possessive]部落的残酷传统，并了解到力量和恐惧是荒原上唯一重要的货币。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Lucius_Adult.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 指挥凯撒的精锐禁卫军。 [PAWN_pronoun] 是一位资深战士，为军团服务了数十年，通过坚定不移的忠诚度和战场技能赢得了 [PAWN_possessive] 职位。 [PAWN_pronoun] 负责凯撒的人身安全和禁卫军的训练。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Lucius_Child.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 是最早在孩童时期融入凯撒军团的部落之一。 [PAWN_pronoun]从小就接受军团之道的训练，学习纪律、战术和对凯撒的绝对忠诚。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vulpes_Adult.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 领导军团的 Frumentarii，即精英情报和渗透部队。被称为“狐狸先生”的 [PAWN_pronoun] 是间谍、破坏和心理战的大师。 [PAWN_pronoun] 在敌后活动，为凯撒的战役制造混乱并收集情报。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vulpes_Child.des: [PAWN_nameDef]从小就表现出非凡的智力和狡猾。当[PAWN_possessive]部落被军团吞并时，[PAWN_pronoun]由于[PAWN_possessive]敏捷的头脑和天生的欺骗天赋而被选中接受特殊训练。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Armorer.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as an armorer for the 英克雷, specializing in the maintenance, repair, and distribution of advanced power armor and energy weapons. With extensive knowledge of pre-war military technology, [PAWN_pronoun] was trusted to outfit elite s老旧iers with the finest equipment available. [PAWN_nameDef] took pride in [PAWN_possessive] work, ensuring every suit of armor and weapon functioned flawlessly. [PAWN_possessive] expertise and dedication made [PAWN_objective] a cornerstone of the 英克雷's military strength.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Armorer.title: 英克雷 Armorer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Arsenal_Specialist: The 英克雷’s high-tech gear needed a lot of maintenance to remain in pristine condition. [PAWN_nameDef] was an 英克雷 arsenal specialist. [PAWN_possessive] job was to repair the advanced power armour of the 英克雷’s Troopers, as well as their high-tech plasma and laser weapons. There were very few communities in the wasteland that were capable of crafting such marvels of technology and the [PAWN_nameDef] zealously guarded these 秘密s.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Biologist.descript: The 英克雷 was very concerned with the exposure of their members to the almost omnipresent radiation of the wasteland. As such, they were careful what their members consumed. [PAWN_nameDef] was tasked with growing the necessary foodstuffs for the 英克雷. While people in the wasteland couldn’t be too picky about what they ate, [PAWN_pronoun] generally preferred to grow corn and other non-mutated crops of the pre-war world, instead of their mutated successors, like tatos.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Biologist.title: 英克雷 Biologist
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Bureaucrat.descrip: While the 英克雷’s bureaucracy was considerably s商场er compared to the one of her 老旧-world pendant, it still needed numerous bureaucrats to tend to the copious amounts of paperwork that accumulated over the years. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those faceless paper pushers and spent most of [PAWN_possessive] life in cramped offices and 蒙尘 conference rooms. While [PAWN_nameDef], was an efficient and competent clerk, [PAWN_pronoun] was rather solitary.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Bureaucrat.title: 英克雷 Bureaucrat
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Compassionate_Chil: Unusual for a child raised in the 英克雷, [PAWN_nameDef] showed compassion and mercy on other creatures, even those deemed lower by fellow 英克雷 members. These character traits made life within the organisation difficult for [PAWN_objective] and [PAWN_pronoun] distanced [PAWN_objective]self from most others.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Conscripted_Adjuta: The 英克雷 never was a particularly numerous group and was, consequentially often short on staff. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up within the lower ranks of the 英克雷 and was conscripted into service at a young age. [PAWN_pronoun] worked as an adjutant for an 英克雷 officer. [PAWN_possessive] supervisor wasn’t a particularly friendly person, but [PAWN_nameDef] learned a lot about the day-to-day duties of a military officer and remembered these lessons well.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Engineer_Trainee.d: The complex machinery the 英克雷 depended upon needed near constant supervision and maintenance. This meant that skilled engineers were always needed and children with a knack for machinery, such as [PAWN_nameDef] were put into training in their early youth.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Entitled_Scion.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the highest echelons of 英克雷 society. [PAWN_pronoun] was used to underlings taking care of [PAWN_possessive] every need and whim, while [PAWN_pronoun] trained and studied for a career in the leading positions of the 英克雷.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Foot_Soldier.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] was a rank-and-file s老旧ier within the 英克雷. Of course, rank-and-file in this case meant [PAWN_pronoun] was an excellently trained fighter, equipped with some of the finest equipment of post-war America and instilled with nothing but scorn and disdain for the average wastelander and all other inhabitants of the wasteland, mutated or not.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Foot_Soldier.title: 英克雷 Foot S老旧ier
英克雷 Foot S老旧ier
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Hellfire_Trooper.d: [PAWN_nameDef] was with the 英克雷 hellfire troopers, an elite group of 英克雷 s老旧iers equipped with experimental hellfire power armour and heavy napalm throwers called incinerators. Due to [PAWN_possessive] yearlong service with the hellfire troopers [PAWN_nameDef] developed a rather… unwholesome fascination with fire, especially when it was brought in contact with living beings.
[PAWN_nameDef] once was a regular farmer, but [PAWN_possessive] life changed the day [PAWN_possessive] humble farmstead was visited by a man in a trench coat and his entourage of armoured brutes. It did not take much intimidation to “persuade” [PAWN_nameDef] to serve [PAWN_possessive] country and deliver the produce of the farmstead to a nearby 英克雷 outpost.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Indentured_Laboure: Once an ordinary wastelander [PAWN_nameDef], wandered around until that fateful day when [PAWN_pronoun] walked right into an 英克雷 patrol. The heavily armed s老旧iers clad in pitch-black power armour t老旧 [PAWN_objective] that the country needed [PAWN_possessive] service. [PAWN_nameDef] had no idea what that meant, but before [PAWN_pronoun] could react, [PAWN_pronoun] was knocked unconscious and dragged away, to serve as a labourer for the 英克雷, fulfilling all kinds of menial work for [PAWN_possessive] new masters.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Indentured_Servant: Many tasks were just beneath the higher-ranking members of the 英克雷. [PAWN_nameDef] was abducted by an 英克雷 patrol to handle some of these tasks. [PAWN_pronoun] was not only put to work as a custodian but was also responsible for negotiations with wastelanders in those rare cases, where the 英克雷 did not resort to violence to achieve her goals as well as supervising the indentured labourers and similar tasks the officers didn’t want to besmirch themselves with.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Junior_Civil_Serva: After finishing basic education [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to serve within the byzantine bureaucracy of the 英克雷, which ensured the functionality of the organisation. The institution’s focus on ruthless efficiency made [PAWN_objective] c老旧 and unkind.
Every once in a while, the 英克雷 would scour the Wasteland in search of new “workers”. While the patrols preferred to abduct adults, they weren’t opposed to capturing children. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those unfortunate kids. While [PAWN_pronoun] was generally looked down upon most other members of the 英克雷, it was possible, although unlikely for [PAWN_objective] to rise up to higher ranks within the organisation.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Lab_Assistant.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] showed great promise while being educated within the 英克雷 and was subsequently made a lab assistant. There [PAWN_pronoun] learned much about many scientific fields such as chemistry, physics, and biology from some of the brightest, albeit not very ethical minds of the Wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Levied_Recruit.des: The skills of the 英克雷’s s老旧iers was the result of years of strenuous training under the supervision of remorseless drill sergeants. Due to a shortage of able recruits, [PAWN_nameDef] was levied into service as a child and spent most of [PAWN_possessive] youth in barracks and on training fields. This made [PAWN_objective] a great warrior indeed, but left little time for anything else, since the 英克雷 did not exactly promote creative thinking within the rank and file.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Officer.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] was an officer of the 英克雷 department of the army. [PAWN_pronoun] truly believed in the 英克雷’s mission to rebuild the USA and was eager to do [PAWN_possessive] part to implement this vision. While [PAWN_pronoun] was a skilled s老旧ier, [PAWN_possessive] true talent lay in motivating [PAWN_possessive] subordinates.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Officer.title: 英克雷 Officer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Peacekeeper_in_Tra: The highly stratified society of the 英克雷 demanded absolute obedience from its citizenry. As an especially loyal child [PAWN_nameDef] was accepted into the ranks of the 英克雷 Peacekeeping Force, where [PAWN_pronoun] quickly learned how to ensure peace and order, especially within the conscripted masses of forced labourers, usually by means of a cattle prod.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Physician.descript: The 英克雷 had a number of highly-trained physicians, whose primary task was to tend to important personnel like officers or high-ranking politicians. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those physicians. [PAWN_pronoun] lacked the distinctive contempt most other 英克雷 members felt for the inhabitants of the wasteland, a character trait that often put [PAWN_objective] at odds with [PAWN_possessive] superiors.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Physician.title: 英克雷 Physician
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Politician.descrip: As most people within the 英克雷, [PAWN_nameDef] was raised to believe that all beings that dwelt in the wasteland were mutated and genetically inferior. [PAWN_pronoun] however, took these lessons more to heart than others and so [PAWN_pronoun] became a politician in the 英克雷, to advocate for the “cleansing” of the wasteland so that, one day, the last unmutated humans could reclaim the land that is rightfully theirs and finally rebuild the nation that once was.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Politician.title: 英克雷 Politician
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Propagandist.descr: While the 英克雷 generally didn’t look favourably upon the other inhabitants of the Wasteland, they had to grudgingly accept that they were useful at times. To keep the wastelanders (mis-)informed about the 英克雷’s intents, [PAWN_nameDef] was instructed to write Propaganda material and distribute it in settlements surrounding the 英克雷’s outpost.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Propagandist.title: 英克雷 Propagandist
英克雷 Propagandist
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Quartermaster.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a quartermaster for the 英克雷, responsible for managing and distributing uniforms, supplies, and essential equipment to s老旧iers and personnel. Known for [PAWN_possessive] meticulous record-keeping and efficient logistics, [PAWN_pronoun] ensured that every unit was properly outfitted for duty. With an eye for detail and a talent for negotiation, [PAWN_nameDef] became an invaluable asset to the 英克雷's supply chain, maintaining the organization's operational readiness even in the harshest conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Secret_Service_Age: Nominally, the 秘密 service is still tasked with the protection of the president of the United States. However, most 英克雷 presidents used them as elite troops, charged with the most pressing matters of national security. [PAWN_nameDef] was part of this elite troop. [PAWN_pronoun] was a perfectly trained killing machine, with a total lack of empathy only concerned with the fulfilment of the president’s orders. Even other 英克雷 members shuddered at [PAWN_possessive] c老旧, calculating personality.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Tesla_Soldier.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] was a tesla s老旧ier with the 英克雷. As the name suggests, these elite troopers are known and feared for their advanced tesla power armour and their prowess with heavy plasma weaponry. Lucky for the inhabitants of the wasteland, [PAWN_nameDef] and the tesla s老旧iers [PAWN_pronoun] belonged to were a rather rare sight, deployed only against the 英克雷’s most stubborn and 危险 enemies.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Warden.description: While most wastelanders were more of a nuisance to the 英克雷 than an actual threat, there were some culprits that caused more trouble. [PAWN_nameDef] was a warden with the 英克雷 and [PAWN_possessive] job was to look after the unfortunate prisoners of the 英克雷, as well as to extract all important information from them, even if they weren’t in possession of such knowledge. As soon as [PAWN_possessive] superiors thought they gained all useful information from a prisoner, it was up to [PAWN_nameDef] execute them, which [PAWN_pronoun] often did in a grisly manner.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Warden.title: 英克雷 Warden
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Zoologist.descript: The 英克雷 was always interested in the mutated wildlife that dwelled in the wasteland. However, their intentions were less based on scientific curiosity and more on the desire to weaponize the horrific beasts roaming the irradiated landscape. [PAWN_nameDef] was a zoologist with the 英克雷 and conducted cruel experiments on many different beasts to test their suitability for combat, as well as methods to control them. While [PAWN_pronoun] was a respected scientist, [PAWN_pronoun] also showed sadistic tendencies and was avoided by most other 英克雷 members.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Enclave_Zoologist.title: 英克雷 Zoologist
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Autumn_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] rose to become Colonel and de facto leader of 英克雷 forces in the Capital Wasteland. Unlike Richardson, [PAWN_pronoun] believed the 英克雷 should control the wasteland's population rather than exterminate them. [PAWN_possessive] pragmatic approach and tactical brilliance made [PAWN_objective] a formidable commander, though [PAWN_pronoun] still held unwavering loyalty to 英克雷 supremacy.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Autumn_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生于西海岸，但随 [PAWN_possessive] 父亲的部队前往首都废土。 [PAWN_pronoun] 在军营中长大，从小就学习纪律和战斗战术。 [PAWN_possessive]父亲的去世给[PAWN_objective]灌输了证明[PAWN_possessive]价值并延续家族遗产的强烈决心。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Curling_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] developed the FEV Curling-13 virus, designed to kill anyone with even trace amounts of wasteland mutation. [PAWN_pronoun] justified this genocide as necessary for humanity's survival, believing only pure humans deserved to inherit Earth. [PAWN_possessive] brilliant but twisted mind created one of the most 危险 bioweapons in post-war history.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Curling_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] showed exceptional aptitude for biology and chemistry from a young age. The 英克雷's scientific division nurtured [PAWN_possessive] talents, providing access to pre-war research data and advanced laboratory equipment. [PAWN_pronoun] studied virology and genetic engineering, fascinated by the potential to reshape humanity at the molecular level.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Dornan_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] became the 英克雷's most feared drill sergeant. [PAWN_pronoun] trained countless s老旧iers with brutal efficiency, accepting nothing less than perfection. [PAWN_possessive] legendary temper and devastating verbal tirades became infamous throughout 英克雷 ranks. While [PAWN_pronoun] was despised, the s老旧iers [PAWN_pronoun] trained were among the finest the 英克雷 had.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Dornan_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up under extremely rigid military discipline on the Oil Rig. [PAWN_possessive] parents were both career s老旧iers who tolerated no deviation from protocol. This upbringing forged [PAWN_objective] into someone who valued order, discipline, and following procedures above all else. [PAWN_pronoun] had no patience for incompetence or excuses.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Holt_Adult.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] defected to the 英克雷, believing they had the resources and willingness to complete Project Purity properly. [PAWN_pronoun] worked on adapting the purifier to the 英克雷's needs, though [PAWN_pronoun] was kept in the dark about Colonel Autumn's true plans. [PAWN_possessive] scientific ambition blinded [PAWN_objective] to the 英克雷's darker intentions.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Holt_Adult.title: 英克雷 Defector
叛逃者
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Holt_Child.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] was originally trained as a scribe in the 钢铁兄弟会. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled at advanced physics and engineering, working on Project Purity. However, [PAWN_pronoun] grew frustrated with the Brotherhood's cautious approach to technology and their unwillingness to push boundaries in pursuit of progress.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Holt_Child.title: 兄弟会实习生
学员
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Horrigan_Adult.b: [PAWN_nameDef] served in the 秘密 Service until exposure to FEV transformed [PAWN_objective] into a super mutant. Rather than terminate [PAWN_objective], the 英克雷 encased [PAWN_objective] in specially modified power armor, creating an unstoppable killing machine. [PAWN_pronoun] became the 英克雷's ultimate enforcer, utterly loyal and mercilessly efficient. [PAWN_possessive] humanity was buried beneath layers of augmentation and conditioning.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Horrigan_Child.b: [PAWN_nameDef] was born abnor商场y large even as a child. The 英克雷 saw [PAWN_possessive] size and strength as valuable assets rather than defects. [PAWN_pronoun] was trained from youth to be a weapon, learning to channel [PAWN_possessive] size into devastating combat effectiveness. [PAWN_pronoun] never questioned orders, only executed them.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Manderly_Adult.b: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a field major, coordinating 英克雷 operations across multiple fronts. [PAWN_pronoun] commanded squads in X-02 power armor and planned strategic strikes against enemy positions. [PAWN_possessive] ability to adapt tactics to changing battlefield conditions earned [PAWN_objective] respect from both superiors and subordinates.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Manderly_Child.b: [PAWN_nameDef] showed talent for strategic thinking and logistics from youth. [PAWN_pronoun] studied pre-war military campaigns and learned to coordinate complex operations. The 英克雷 trained [PAWN_objective] in both combat leadership and strategic planning, preparing [PAWN_objective] for field command.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Moreau_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] 通过出色的战斗能力和战术领导力赢得了 [PAWN_possessive] 队长军衔。 [PAWN_pronoun] 在前线作战中指挥动力装甲小队，证明技能和决心比性别更重要。 [PAWN_possessive]部队尊重[PAWN_objective]，因为他们在前线领导，从不要求他们做任何[PAWN_pronoun]自己不会做的事情。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Moreau_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up as a military child, moving between 英克雷 facilities. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to adapt quickly and became proficient in various combat scenarios. Watching [PAWN_possessive] parents serve with distinction inspired [PAWN_objective] to pursue a military career and prove [PAWN_pronoun] could excel in the male-dominated officer corps.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Richardson_Adult: [PAWN_nameDef] 成为 英克雷 主席，领导美国政府的残余人员。 [PAWN_pronoun] 支持 FEV Curling-13 项目，以根除荒地上所有“变异”生命。 [PAWN_possessive] 对基因纯度的坚定信念使 [PAWN_objective] 成为 英克雷 理论家，他会不惜一切代价实现 [PAWN_possessive] 净化美国的愿景。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Richardson_Child: [PAWN_nameDef] was born into the 英克雷's political elite on the Poseidon Oil Rig. [PAWN_pronoun] grew up surrounded by pre-war American ideals and the belief in genetic purity. From childhood, [PAWN_pronoun] was groomed for leadership, studying governance, rhetoric, and the 英克雷's vision for America's restoration.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vickers_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] commanded 英克雷 Hellfire trooper units in the Capital Wasteland. [PAWN_pronoun] led brutal operations against 钢铁兄弟会 positions and wastelander settlements. [PAWN_possessive] tactical acumen and ruthless efficiency made [PAWN_objective] one of Colonel Autumn's most valuable officers. [PAWN_pronoun] wore the experimental Hellfire armor, marking [PAWN_objective] as an elite among elites.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Vickers_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] was selected for elite officer training from an early age. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled in tactical simulations and power armor operations. The 英克雷's instructors saw [PAWN_objective] as officer material, grooming [PAWN_objective] for command positions in their most critical operations.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Whitley_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in 英克雷 research facilities, helping develop the Hellfire power armor and advanced combat robots. [PAWN_pronoun] became socially isolated, preferring the company of machines to people. [PAWN_possessive] work was brilliant but [PAWN_pronoun] rarely considered the ethical implications of [PAWN_possessive] creations. Eventually, the weight of what [PAWN_pronoun] had helped create began to trouble [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Whitley_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] was fascinated by robots and artificial intelligence from childhood. [PAWN_pronoun] spent countless hours studying pre-war robotics manuals and programming guides. The 英克雷 recognized [PAWN_possessive] talent and provided specialized training in cybernetics and AI systems.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Actor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 曾在舞台和银幕上表演过。现在，[PAWN_pronoun] 以故事和对失落世界的模仿来娱乐。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Actor.title: 老旧 World Actor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Bartender.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] 在一座半倒塌的建筑中经营一家酒吧，为旅行者和当地人提供饮料和建议。 [PAWN_pronoun] 学会倾听，并制止偶尔的争吵。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Bartender.title: 荒地调酒师
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Bureaucrat.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] 在爆炸发生前在政府办公室里翻阅文件。现在，[PAWN_pronoun] 使用 [PAWN_possessive] 组织技能来维持定居点的运行。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Bureaucrat.title: 战前官僚
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Caravan_Guard.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] 花了数年时间护送商队穿过荒地，抵御袭击者和变种人。 [PAWN_pronoun] 始终对危险保持警惕。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Caravan_Guard.title: 商队守卫
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Chem_Cook.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years brewing chems in 隐蔽 labs. [PAWN_pronoun] knows the dangers of addiction and the value of a steady hand.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Chem_Cook.title: 化学库克
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Entertainer.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] 曾经是一名歌手或喜剧演员，现在用来自早已不复存在的世界的故事和歌曲来娱乐废土人。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Entertainer.title: 战前艺人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Feral_Hunter.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] 在荒野中潜行，猎杀变异野兽作为食物和运动。 [PAWN_pronoun] 很凶猛并且知道如何追踪猎物。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Feral_Hunter.title: 野性猎人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Feral_Survivor.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] 多年来一直处于疯狂的边缘，仅凭本能生存。 [PAWN_pronoun] 很难相处，但很难与他人建立联系。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Feral_Survivor.title: 野生幸存者
野生幸存者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Grave_Robber.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living digging up graves and looting the dead. [PAWN_pronoun] is skilled at moving quietly and finding 隐蔽 things.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Grave_Robber.title: 盗墓者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Historian.descriptio: Before the bombs fell, [PAWN_nameDef] was a keeper of knowledge. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] is a living relic, sharing stories of the 老旧 world with anyone who will listen.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Historian.title: 战前历史学家
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Mechanic.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 在战前修复了汽车、机器人和任何其他带有活动部件的东西。现在，[PAWN_pronoun] 让破烂的机器在荒地上继续运转。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Mechanic.title: 老旧 World Mechanic
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Mutant_Wrangler.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] 专门为定居点和商人捕获和驯服变异生物。 [PAWN_pronoun] 在野兽面前无所畏惧。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Nurse.description: [PAWN_nameDef] cared for the sick and wounded before the bombs. [PAWN_pronoun] still tends to the injured, using both 老旧 and new techniques.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Nurse.title: 老旧 World Nurse
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Old_World_Chef.descr: 战前，[PAWN_nameDef] 是一位著名的厨师。现在，[PAWN_pronoun] 充分利用荒地原料来喂养幸存者。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Old_World_Chef.title: 老旧 World Chef
厨师
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Old_World_Cop.descri: 战前，[PAWN_nameDef] 执行法律。现在，[PAWN_pronoun] 在无法无天的世界中尽最大努力维持秩序。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Old_World_Cop.title: 老旧 World Cop
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Pre_war_Doctor.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] 曾经是一位受人尊敬的医生，现在使用 [PAWN_possessive] 知识在荒原上包扎伤口并治疗放射病。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Pre_war_Doctor.title: 战前医生
医生
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Preacher.description: [PAWN_nameDef]在荒野中徘徊，向那些愿意倾听的人传播希望和信仰。 [PAWN_pronoun] 是一位熟练的演说家和顾问。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Preacher.title: 荒地传教士
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Radio_Operator.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years maintaining and operating 老旧-world radio towers, relaying messages across the wastes. [PAWN_pronoun] is skilled with electronics and communication.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Radio_Operator.title: 无线电操作员
广播电台
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Raider_Outcast.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] 曾经与一个邪恶的掠夺者团伙一起行动，但因太过不同而被驱逐。 [PAWN_pronoun] 很难，但赢得信任却很难。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Raider_Outcast.title: 掠夺者流放者
被遗弃者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Relic_Hunter.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] scoured 废墟s for valuable pre-war artifacts, trading them for supplies. [PAWN_pronoun] has a keen eye for 隐蔽 treasures.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Relic_Hunter.title: 遗物猎人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Rot_Farmer.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] 在受辐射的土壤中照料变异作物，种植别人不敢碰的食物。 [PAWN_pronoun] 很坚强，知道如何靠很少的钱生存。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Rot_Farmer.title: 腐烂农夫
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scavenger.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] survived by picking through 废墟s and forgotten vaults, always searching for something valuable. Years of scavenging made [PAWN_pronoun] resourceful, but wary of strangers.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scavenger.title: 荒地拾荒者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Artist.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] turned junk into art, making sculptures from twisted metal and broken glass. [PAWN_pronoun] sees beauty where others see only 废墟.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Artist.title: 废品艺术家
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Merchant.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] bought and s老旧 scrap, bartering with travelers and settlements. [PAWN_pronoun] knows the value of everything and the price of trust.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Merchant.title: 废品商人
商人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Sculptor.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] welded together art from the 废墟s, creating beauty from destruction. [PAWN_pronoun] is creative and skilled with tools.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Scrap_Sculptor.title: 废雕塑家
雕塑家
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Teacher.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 曾经是战前学校的老师，现在试图将知识传授给下一代，尽管很少有人愿意听。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Teacher.title: 老旧 World Teacher
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Tunnel_Dweller.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] lived for decades in the dark tunnels beneath 废墟ed cities, emerging only when necessary. [PAWN_pronoun] is used to darkness and silence.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Tunnel_Dweller.title: 隧道居民
隧道居民
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Tunnel_Rat.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] 几十年来一直生活在地铁隧道和下水道中，躲避阳光和地表危险。 [PAWN_pronoun] 变得善于在黑暗中隐形移动和生存。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Tunnel_Rat.title: 隧道鼠
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Vault_Janitor.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] 保持金库清洁和运行，修复泄漏并疏通管道。炸弹袭击后，[PAWN_pronoun] 仍在继续工作，即使金库已经崩溃。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Vault_Janitor.title: 避难所看门人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Ghoul_Vault_Technician.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 维护金库的系统，保持灯亮，门密封。 [PAWN_pronoun] 精通机器和电子产品。
[PAWN_nameDef] protected a 秘密ive cult devoted to the glow, using [PAWN_possessive] strength to keep outsiders at bay and defend sacred sites.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Glowlight_Scou: [PAWN_nameDef] 被派往食尸鬼团体之前，利用 [PAWN_possessive] 的光芒作为黑暗中的灯塔，在放射性废土中寻找安全路径。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Irradiated_Hea: [PAWN_nameDef]学会了使用[PAWN_possessive]自己的放射性接触来治愈其他食尸鬼，减轻他们的疼痛并用一种奇怪的发光能量闭合伤口。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Cultist.de: [PAWN_nameDef]崇拜光芒，向其他人宣扬辐射的净化力量。 [PAWN_pronoun] 热情且有说服力，但有时精神错乱。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Hermit.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 独自生活在一个放射性陨石坑中，受到其他人的回避，但对光芒感到平静。 [PAWN_pronoun] 很自给自足，很少说话。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Mystic.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 声称在放射性烟雾中看到了幻象，为食尸鬼同伴解释预兆。 [PAWN_pronoun]因[PAWN_possessive]洞察力和奇异的智慧而受到尊重。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Outcast.de: Feared even by other ghouls, [PAWN_nameDef] was forced to live on the fringes of society, surviving on whatever [PAWN_pronoun] could scavenge from the most irradiated 废墟s.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Pilgrim.de: [PAWN_nameDef] 环游世界寻找辐射力强的地方，相信每一次旅程都会让 [PAWN_pronoun] 更接近启蒙。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Prophet.de: [PAWN_nameDef] 声称收到了放射性风暴的幻象，用神秘的警告和预言来指导其他人。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Shaman.des: [PAWN_nameDef]因[PAWN_possessive]承受和引导辐射的能力而受到食尸鬼的尊敬。 [PAWN_pronoun] 引导其他人穿过受辐射最严重的地方，相信光芒是一种祝福。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Shepherd.d: [PAWN_nameDef] led groups of ghouls through the most 危险, glowing wastelands, keeping them safe from both radiation and predators.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Rad_Warden.des: [PAWN_nameDef] guarded the entrances to highly irradiated zones, warning or driving off those who could not survive the glow. [PAWN_pronoun] 警惕且令人生畏。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Radstorm_Survi: [PAWN_nameDef] 在一场足以杀死大多数人的灾难性辐射风暴中幸存下来。这段经历让[PAWN_pronoun]容光焕发，永远改变了，但也奇怪地充满了活力。
[PAWN_nameDef]在一个发光的火山口深处维护着一座神殿，负责照料圣物并为来访的食尸鬼举行仪式。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Zone_Forager.d: [PAWN_nameDef]通过从受辐射最严重的地方采集可食用植物和真菌而生存下来，那里只有发光的人才敢踏足。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Zone_Guide.des: [PAWN_nameDef] led non-ghouls through 危险 glowing zones, charging a hefty fee for [PAWN_possessive] expertise and protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Zone_Herbalist: [PAWN_nameDef] 学​​会了识别和使用仅在放射性区域发现的稀有变异植物，酿造强效药物和毒药。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Zone_Hermit.de: [PAWN_nameDef] 独自生活在放射性废土的中心，很少见到其他灵魂。 [PAWN_pronoun] 自力更生，对外人保持警惕。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Zone_Outlaw.de: Banished from settlements, [PAWN_nameDef] survived by raiding travelers and hiding in radioactive 废墟s where few would follow.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Glowing_One_Zone_Scavenger: [PAWN_nameDef] braved the most radioactive 废墟s to recover valuable salvage, risking [PAWN_possessive] life for rare technology and supplies.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Post_war_Bodyg: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living by protecting affluent customers from the dangers of the wasteland. [PAWN_pronoun] protected wealthy caravaners, important officials from everything and everyone that would harm them, as long as they paid of course. While it may have been less lethal than working as a mercenary, it was still 危险 and [PAWN_nameDef] had the scars to prove it.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Post_war_Under: Life in the wasteland was often brutal, arduous and short. Some of the larger settlements employed an undertaker. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those undertakers and [PAWN_possessive] job was to dig graves and bury those whose lives were claimed by raiders, radiation, mutated beasts and, occasionally, 老旧 age.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Pre_war_Gourme: Just the thought of eating radroaches or molerats made [PAWN_nameDef] shiver with disgust. [PAWN_pronoun] was what some called an 老旧-world gourmet and preferred to dine on 古老 rations of canned meat, mac and cheese and Salisbury steak. While most members of [PAWN_possessive] community only shook their heads at [PAWN_possessive] behaviour, none could argue that [PAWN_pronoun] was indeed a good cook.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Advisor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 是一位受人尊敬且睿智的战士，是部落首领的顾问。 [PAWN_pronoun] 对于可汗来说头脑异常冷静，并建议不要采取仓促和过度暴力的行动，一些年轻的战士认为这是软弱的表现。然而，[PAWN_pronoun] 是一位非常有能力的战士，并且总是以部落的福祉为重。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Advisor.title: 可汗顾问
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Arena_Fighter.descrip: Most Great Khan camps featured a prominent arena, usually in the centre of it. These were used to carry out the brutal initiation ritual of the tribe but were also used for “recreational” purposes. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of the most eager combatants of the arena and made a s商场 fortune by betting on [PAWN_objective]self. While [PAWN_pronoun] wasn’t a very good shot, few Khans could match [PAWN_objective] in close combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Arena_Fighter.title: 可汗竞技场斗士
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Armorer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 是可汗的一名军械匠，负责维护部落的武器和盔甲。可汗是一个贫穷的部落，几乎没有机会获得高端武器或盔甲，但 [PAWN_nameDef] 足智多谋，成功地用兽皮和废弃金属碎片制造出血统盔甲。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Armorer.title: 可汗装甲师
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Born_Khan.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生于大汗的掠夺者部落。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 可能没有接受过太多正规教育，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 对该团伙居住的土地了解很多。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Born_Khan.title: 出生可汗
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Cave_Dweller.descript: While most Khans preferred to live in yurts, many built their camps near caves. While this might seem primitive, even for the Khans, natural caves made easily defendable homes and were usually much less prone to collapse compared to pre-war 废墟s. [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in and around an extensive cave system and helped expand it, if needed.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Cave_Dweller.title: 可汗穴居者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Chem_Maker.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] was a gifted chemist and an important member of [PAWN_possessive] tribe, as [PAWN_possessive] chems proved to be a reliable source of income for the otherwise poor and isolated group. While most Khans didn’t concern themselves with intellectual pursuits, [PAWN_nameDef] was always on the lookout for 老旧 books to learn new tricks to perfect [PAWN_possessive] trade.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Chem_Maker.title: 可汗化学制造商
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Chem_Runner.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] 是 [PAWN_possessive] 部落中为数不多的经常长时间远离营地的可汗之一。 [PAWN_pronoun] 是一名化学跑者，负责将部落的产品运送给他们的客户，无论是掠夺者、医生还是商队装备。由于[PAWN_possessive]商品的价值，[PAWN_nameDef]必须精明而狡猾，才能躲避竞争对手的化学经销商，以及寻求解决办法的绝望的瘾君子。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Chem_Runner.title: 化学亚军
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Child_Prodigy.descrip: 由于可汗很少有机会进入高科技车间，像[PAWN_nameDef]这样具有维护机器和武器天赋的孩子通常由部落的军械师培养和训练。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Child_Prodigy.title: 可汗神童
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Daredevil.description: The Great Khans relaxed attitude towards their offspring’s upbringing often led to risky or outright 危险 games and activities the children participated in. [PAWN_nameDef] was known as one of the most daring children of [PAWN_possessive] tribe. [PAWN_pronoun] greatly enjoyed taunting tribe’s bighorners and similar games of questionable pedagogic value.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Daredevil.title: 可汗夜魔侠
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Educated_Khan.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] 是少数几个接受过一群旅行的天启追随者教育的可汗孩子之一。追随者教授[PAWN_objective]如何阅读和写作以及一些自然科学和人文学科的基础知识。虽然这在其他社会中可能没有多大意义，但它使 [PAWN_nameDef] 成为部落中最有名的成员之一。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Educated_Khan.title: 受过教育的可汗
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Firekeeper.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] 从来都不是可汗中最熟练的战士之一。 [PAWN_pronoun] 的任务是维持部落营地的火势、照顾伤者和病者并准备部落的膳食。由于可汗们几乎无法获得先进的医学，[PAWN_nameDef]学会了用营地周围生长的草药来凑合。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Firekeeper.title: 可汗火卫
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Forager.description: 大多数大汗的营地都位于贫瘠而偏僻的地区，农业生产十分困难。然而，许多植物即使在最荒凉的地方也能生长，其中许多植物可以食用或对部落有用。 [PAWN_nameDef] 的任务是寻找并收集这些植物。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Forager.title: 可汗采集者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Foundling.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 是一个被一群可汗发现并收养的弃儿。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 可能不是生来就是可汗，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 长大后肯定会成为可汗。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Foundling.title: 可汗弃婴
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Guard.description: 作为部落最精锐的战士之一，[PAWN_nameDef] 被指派为可汗无可争议的领袖帕帕汗 (Papa Khan) 的私人护卫。 [PAWN_pronoun] 非常严肃地对待 [PAWN_possessive] 这项职责，尽管事实上只有疯子才敢在可汗营地中攻击爸爸可汗。然而，[PAWN_possessive] 的特权地位使得 [PAWN_objective] 对部落的其他成员有些傲慢，并且 [PAWN_pronoun] 通常不太受欢迎。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Guard.title: 可汗守卫
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Herder.description: 当可汗被驱逐出加利福尼亚州相对肥沃的土地时，他们必须适应新的、更恶劣的环境，在那里农业几乎不可能实现，很快就完全被畜牧业所取代。 [PAWN_nameDef] 是可汗中的一名牧民，注视着大角牛和婆罗门部落，他们非常依赖这些部落来获取食物、兽皮和粪便作为燃料和化学品生产。这不是最光荣的任务，但 [PAWN_nameDef] 很乐意完成 [PAWN_possessive] 的部分。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Herder.title: 汗赫尔德
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Hunter.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a hunter with the Great Khans. Hunting the usually very 危险 beasts of the wasteland was seen as the second most respected task, just short of being a warrior. [PAWN_nameDef] was a skilled shot and knew how to live off the land for extended periods of time while [PAWN_pronoun] prowled through the wasteland on the lookout for worthwhile quarry to feed [PAWN_possessive] tribe.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Hunter.title: 可汗·亨特
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Idealistic_Khan_Young: [PAWN_nameDef] 诞生于大汗的辉煌岁月之后很久，并且像许多其他人一样，渴望着荒原在他们面前因恐惧而颤抖的时代。 [PAWN_pronoun] 不惜一切代价寻求部落的遗产。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Labourer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 是大汗的成员，但对部落喜欢的活动（即战斗、狩猎以及毒品的生产和分配）表现出很少的天赋。相反，[PAWN_pronoun] 被派去从事其他可汗无法或不愿做的领域。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Labourer.title: 可汗劳工
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Legend_Keeper.descrip: 虽然可汗从来都不是文化最丰富的民族之一，但他们非常重视自己的传说。 [PAWN_nameDef] 是这些传说的守护者，他们在营地附近的墙壁和岩石上装饰着粗糙但色彩丰富的壁画，描绘了 [PAWN_possessive] 部落的强大战士、伟大胜利和毁灭性损失的故事。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Legend_Keeper.title: 可汗传奇守护者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Mercenary.description: 由于部落的帽子短缺是出了名的，一些人在营地外寻找雇佣兵的工作，以便将部分帽子送回家。 [PAWN_nameDef] 就是其中之一，可汗作为残酷野蛮人的可怕名声意味着工作并不缺乏，尽管 [PAWN_pronoun] 经常被 [PAWN_possessive] 雇主欺骗。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Mercenary.title: 可汗雇佣兵
并非所有可汗都适合做父母。许多人吸毒成瘾，忽视了自己的孩子。 [PAWN_nameDef] 父母通常喝醉酒或吸毒，即使不关心他们的后代。 [PAWN_pronoun] 从小就必须照顾 [PAWN_objective] 自己，因此即使在成年后也不喜欢依赖他人。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Negotiator.descriptio: 虽然可汗本质上仍然是掠夺者，但他们始终在寻找盟友来帮助他们对抗 NCR。 [PAWN_nameDef] 善于言辞且文雅（无论如何对于可汗而言）并且经常负责谈判，无论是军事联盟还是贸易协定。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Negotiator.title: 可汗谈判者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Poet.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 在大汗中是个怪人，因为 [PAWN_pronoun] 对战斗和讲述伟大事迹的故事表现出很少的兴趣。相反，[PAWN_pronoun]更喜欢写质量有争议的诗歌，这使得[PAWN_objective]成为其他可汗嘲笑的首选目标。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Poet.title: 可汗诗人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Raid_Survivor.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] 是大汗袭击中为数不多的幸存者之一。虽然可汗被恰当地称为野蛮战士，但他们通常不会杀害儿童。 [PAWN_nameDef] 幸免于难，并作为他们自己的一员被带入部落。 [PAWN_pronoun] 被广泛接受，但仍然对那些谋杀 [PAWN_possessive] 家人的人怀有怨恨。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Raid_Survivor.title: 突袭幸存者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Ritualist.description: 虽然大汗们绝不是宗教人士，但他们也珍视一些仪式和传统。 [PAWN_nameDef] 负责监督部落残酷的入会仪式并为幸存者提供修补，以及进行祖先崇拜仪式（通常由纪念宴会组成）。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Ritualist.title: 可汗祭祀者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Roaming_Khan_Kid.desc: 作为与可汗在一起的孩子，[PAWN_nameDef] 花费了大部分 [PAWN_possessive] 时间在他们营地周围的土地上漫游，并且 [PAWN_pronoun] 从长辈那里学到了很多关于居住在荒地的植物和野兽的知识。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Ruffian.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 非常适合可汗的生活。 [PAWN_pronoun] 很容易发生粗暴行为，并很快成为部落孩子们的领袖。 [PAWN_pronoun] 缺乏智力，[PAWN_pronoun] 用狡猾来弥补，许多人预见到 [PAWN_objective] 未来会成为一名伟大的战士。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Ruffian.title: 汗·鲁芬
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Runt.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was born s商场 and weak. Few Khan Children with these attributes survive their early childhood, either because of the harsh living conditions or because they are killed outright since a weak child would not survive the brutal initiation rites anyway. [PAWN_nameDef], however, endured and even prospered, a testament to [PAWN_possessive] tenacity.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Runt.title: 汗·鲁特
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Savage.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 体格强壮，头脑简单，是可汗的典型形象。 [PAWN_pronoun] 喜欢打架、喝酒、讲夸张的故事，除此之外几乎没有其他爱好。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 可能不是荒原上最聪明的人，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 肯定可以打得很厉害。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Savage.title: 可汗萨维奇
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Scout.description: 大可汗有偏执倾向，考虑到他们最近的历史，这并不奇怪。 [PAWN_nameDef] 担任 [PAWN_possessive] 部落的侦察兵，并一直在营地周围寻找潜在的敌人，例如 NCR 巡逻队。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 是一名合格的战士，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 非常清楚可汗缺乏数量和训练来与 NCR 进行真正的战斗。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Scout.title: 可汗侦察兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Storyteller.descripti: 可汗们非常喜欢的少数与暴力或酗酒无关的事情之一就是讲述经常夸张的故事。虽然大多数可汗都在某种程度上做到了这一点，但 [PAWN_nameDef] 将其变成了一种艺术形式。 [PAWN_pronoun] 非常擅长，以至于很少有 [PAWN_possessive] 部落成员关心这样一个事实：他们中的大多数人甚至都不是基于真实事件。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Storyteller.title: 可汗讲故事的人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Trader.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 是一位可汗，而且是一个不寻常的可汗，因为 [PAWN_pronoun] 是一名商人。由于部落试图避免 NCR 的注意和愤怒，因此有必要以物易物，而不是简单地通过武力夺取。该部落几乎没有多余的东西，但兽皮通常能卖个好价钱，让 [PAWN_nameDef] 可以购买急需的物品，通常是水、弹药和食品。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Trader.title: 可汗商人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Tribal_Survivor.descr: As a child [PAWN_nameDef] was a survivor of a tribe eradicated by a ruthless group of raiders. [PAWN_pronoun] was found and taken in by a group of Khans who happened upon the smouldering 废墟s of [PAWN_possessive] village. [PAWN_possessive] tribal knowledge about the plants and animals of the wasteland served the Khans well.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Tribal_Survivor.title: 部落幸存者
部落幸存者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Vengeful_Survivor.des: 可汗的历史充满了悲剧和灾难，其中最重要的是苦泉大屠杀。一些可汗试图用毒品和酒精来压制这些记忆，而其他可汗，其中包括[PAWN_nameDef]，成为了没有目标或长期计划但只有复仇的恶毒杀手。虽然大多数可汗都尽可能地过着美好的生活，但 [PAWN_possessive] 的思绪却落在部落必须哀悼的许多死者身上，并且 [PAWN_nameDef] 决心以同样的方式回应。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Visionary.description: 虽然许多可汗对部落的现状感到不满，但很少有人知道如何改变它。 [PAWN_nameDef] 是那些梦想伟大的可汗之一。 [PAWN_pronoun]想要带领他们走出荒凉的藏身处，进入北方的荒野，建立一个属于自己的帝国。当然，并非所有臭名昭著的顽固可汗都热衷于[PAWN_possessive]想法。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Visionary.title: 可汗有远见
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_War_Party_Leader.desc: As one of the tribe’s most capable fighters, [PAWN_nameDef] was leading the war parties which often roamed the camp’s surroundings on the lookout for caravans to waylay or promising 废墟s to scavenge. [PAWN_pronoun] was beloved by the fighting men and women of the tribe, not only because of [PAWN_possessive] valour, but for [PAWN_possessive] genuine concern and care for all that fought by [PAWN_possessive] side.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Warrior.description: Tough and resilient, [PAWN_nameDef] was a warrior with the Great Khans. [PAWN_pronoun] often joined the tribe’s war parties on their raids through the wasteland and hoped to bring back valuables and much needed supplies for the tribe, either scavenged from 废墟s or taken off of some unfortunate caravan.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Warrior.title: 可汗战士
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Warriors_Child.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] 是部落最伟大的战士之一的孩子。 [PAWN_pronoun] 试图模仿 [PAWN_possessive] 父母，这让 [PAWN_possessive] 祖先感到非常自豪。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Warriors_Child.title: 战士的孩子
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Young_Herder.descript: 可汗从来都不是这片荒原上最富裕的群体。因此，即使是年幼的孩子通常也必须帮助部落在他们称之为家园的严酷荒原中生存。 [PAWN_nameDef]协助部落的牧民并照顾他们非常依赖的大角人和婆罗门。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Young_Herder.title: 年轻的牧民
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Yurt_Maker.descriptio: 许多可汗避开居住在房屋中，而更喜欢称为蒙古包或蒙古包的传统帐篷，尽管它们很大，但在搬迁时可以快速拆卸和运输。 [PAWN_nameDef] 是用动物皮和废弃布料制作这些帐篷的专家。他们的坚固证明了 [PAWN_possessive] 技能，并且 [PAWN_pronoun] 受到 [PAWN_possessive] 部落的高度重视。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Khan_Yurt_Maker.title: 蒙古包制造商
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Anders_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] served the Great Khans as a loyal s老旧ier, fighting in raids and defending the camp. [PAWN_pronoun] was still relatively young and eager to prove [PAWN_pronoun] could be as fierce as the veteran warriors. [PAWN_pronoun] idolized Papa Khan and the other leaders, seeing them as the family [PAWN_pronoun] never had. [PAWN_possessive] loyalty to the tribe was absolute.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Anders_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] 年轻时就成了孤儿，在街头生存，直到大可汗招募了 [PAWN_objective]。部落赋予了[PAWN_objective]目标、训练和新家庭。 [PAWN_pronoun] 热切地拥抱可汗文化，感激有归属感，并决心证明 [PAWN_possessive] 的价值。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Diane_Adult.base: [PAWN_nameDef] 成为大汗的主要化学制造商和经销商之一。 [PAWN_pronoun] 生产高品质的精神、喷气和其他化学品，使帽子源源不断地流入部落。 [PAWN_pronoun] 了解贸易的商业方面，与买家谈判并维护供应链。有些人质疑传播成瘾行为的道德性，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 认为这是为了生存——可汗们几乎没有其他可以交易的东西。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Diane_Child.base: [PAWN_nameDef] showed an early aptitude for mixing chemicals and understanding reactions. The Khan chem-makers noticed [PAWN_possessive] talent and began teaching [PAWN_objective] the 秘密s of their trade. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that chems weren't just products - they were the tribe's primary source of income and survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Jack_Adult.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] 成为大可汗的主要盔甲匠，负责维护武器并用任何可以回收的材料制作盔甲。 [PAWN_pronoun] 对 [PAWN_possessive] 的工作感到自豪，因为知道优质装备可能意味着 [PAWN_possessive] 可汗同胞的生死之别。 [PAWN_pronoun]梦想获得更好的工具和材料来提升部落的装备。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Jack_Adult.title: 可汗装甲师
军械师
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Jack_Child.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef]从小就学会了使用金属和机械。当其他可汗的孩子们扮演掠夺者的角色时，[PAWN_pronoun]却对事情的运作方式着迷。 [PAWN_pronoun] 收集废料并学会将其变成有用的物品，培养对部落有价值的技能。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Jack_Child.title: 拾荒者的学徒
学徒
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Jerry_Adult.base: [PAWN_nameDef] 成为了大可汗的招募人员，在废土流放者和麻烦制造者中寻找潜在成员。 [PAWN_pronoun] 具有识别那些能够在可汗文化中茁壮成长并说服他们加入的天赋。 [PAWN_pronoun] 不是最好的战士，但 [PAWN_possessive] 引入新鲜血液的能力使得 [PAWN_objective] 很有价值。有些人因 [PAWN_objective] 傲慢的态度而将 [PAWN_possessive] 称为“朋克杰瑞”。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Jerry_Child.base: [PAWN_nameDef] 并非出生于可汗 - [PAWN_pronoun] 是一个靠狡猾和机会主义幸存下来的荒地孩子。 [PAWN_pronoun] 学会用 [PAWN_possessive] 说话来摆脱麻烦并发现他人的弱点。当可汗发现 [PAWN_objective] 时，[PAWN_pronoun] 看到了比勉强糊口更好的机会。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Jessup_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] 成为大汗袭击者，参与莫哈韦沙漠的行动。 [PAWN_pronoun] 不是最熟练的战士，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 很可靠并且遵守命令。 [PAWN_pronoun]有时会质疑袭击生活方式是否可持续，但将这些疑问留给[PAWN_pronoun]自己。 [PAWN_pronoun] 欠可汗们在 [PAWN_objective] 一无所有的时候收留 [PAWN_pronoun]。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Jessup_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] spent [PAWN_possessive] youth wandering the wasteland with [PAWN_possessive] family, never staying in one place long. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to navigate 危险 terrain and read situations quickly. When [PAWN_possessive] family was killed by raiders, the Khans took [PAWN_objective] in.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Karl_Adult.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] 担任大汗的卫兵，保护营地并警惕威胁。 [PAWN_pronoun] 认真对待 [PAWN_possessive] 职责，理解保持警惕可以保证部落的安全。 [PAWN_pronoun] 忠于爸爸可汗，毫无疑问地服从命令，体现了可汗传统的力量和忠诚价值观。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Karl_Adult.title: 可汗守卫
警卫
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Karl_Child.baseD: [PAWN_nameDef] 在大汗中出生和长大，从出生起就学习他们的生活方式。 [PAWN_pronoun] 从小就听着过去的袭击和胜利的故事长大，崇拜那些与 NCR 作战的战士。 [PAWN_pronoun] 刻苦训练，证明 [PAWN_pronoun] 可以像传说中一样坚韧。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Karl_Child.title: 汗·博恩
汗·博恩
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Melissa_Adult.ba: 在向 NCR 复仇的需要的驱使下，[PAWN_nameDef] 成为了大可汗最凶猛的战士之一。 [PAWN_pronoun] 坚持不懈地训练，熟练使用多种武器。 [PAWN_possessive] 仇恨如此之深，以至于 [PAWN_pronoun] 反对任何与熊和平或合作的建议。对于[PAWN_objective]来说，苦泉是不可原谅的。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Melissa_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] 十几岁时在苦泉大屠杀中幸存下来。 [PAWN_pronoun] 看着 NCR 士兵枪杀了逃向安全地带的 [PAWN_possessive] 朋友和家人。那天的创伤深深烙印在[PAWN_possessive]的灵魂中，对NCR和所有佩戴这只熊的人产生了难以抑制的仇恨。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Oscar_Adult.base: [PAWN_nameDef] became a respected warrior among the Great Khans. [PAWN_pronoun] participated in numerous raids and battles, earning [PAWN_possessive] place through combat prowess. [PAWN_pronoun] believed in the 老旧 ways - that the strong should take what they need and the weak deserved their fate. [PAWN_pronoun] remained skeptical of softer approaches to survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Oscar_Child.base: [PAWN_nameDef] 从小就学会了掠夺者的生活方式——拿走你需要的东西，靠力量生存。 [PAWN_pronoun] 作为一名青少年参加了 [PAWN_possessive] 第一次突袭，了解到暴力有时是生存所必需的。可汗的生活方式对 [PAWN_objective] 来说很自然。
[PAWN_nameDef] 成为Papa Khan，大汗的领袖。 [PAWN_pronoun] 在苦泉惨败后领导了部落，NCR 部队在那里屠杀了妇女、儿童和老人。这场悲剧让 [PAWN_objective] 变得更加坚强，让 [PAWN_objective] 对 NCR 怀有怨恨，并深深地保护着剩下的 [PAWN_possessive] 人民。 [PAWN_pronoun] 在可汗的劫掠和暴力传统与确保部落在不断变化的荒地中生存的需要之间进行斗争。
[PAWN_nameDef] 出生于大汗的领导层，是前任可汗的儿子。 [PAWN_pronoun] 从小就听着 NCR 过去的辉煌和毁灭性失败的故事长大。从童年起，[PAWN_pronoun] 就被训练成为一名战士和领导者，学习可汗之道，即力量、自由和对部落的忠诚高于一切。
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Regis_Adult.base: [PAWN_nameDef] became an advisor to Papa Khan, serving as a voice of reason and long-term thinking. [PAWN_pronoun] witnessed the Bitter Springs Massacre and understood that continuing the 老旧 ways would only lead to extinction. [PAWN_pronoun] advocated for evolution - maintaining Khan identity while adapting to survive. Some saw [PAWN_objective] as weak, but [PAWN_pronoun] understood that true strength meant ensuring the tribe's future.
LanguageData.FCP_Character_Backstory_Regis_Child.base: [PAWN_nameDef] 总是比一般可汗青年更加沉思。当其他孩子因战争故事而感到自豪时，[PAWN_pronoun] 却关注战斗获胜或失败的原因。 [PAWN_pronoun] 学会了阅读和研究可汗所拥有的为数不多的书籍，明白大脑可以和肌肉一样有价值。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Academics_Child.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] 的父母是在科学与工业办公室（简称 OSI）工作的科学家。因此，他们非常重视高等教育，并确保他们的后代接受许多科学领域的教育。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 是一位有天赋的学生，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 从来都不是一位艺术家。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Academics_Child.title: 学者的孩子
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Ambassador.description: 当NCR试图效仿战前社会时，他们采用了向部落和文明派遣大使的传统，认为值得他们关注。 [PAWN_nameDef] 是其中一位大使，精通政治才能，并与部落首​​领和外国领导人握手。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Ambassador.title: NCR大使
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Barracks_Baby.descript: 与 NCR 内的许多其他孩子一样，[PAWN_nameDef] 是在 NCR 军队前哨基地内受孕、出生和长大的。 [PAWN_pronoun] 接受过相当实用的教育，从小就接受过使用枪械的训练。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Barracks_Baby.title: 军营宝贝
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Brahmin_Baron.descript: : As the NCR grew in size, several former ranchers managed to monopolize much of the livestock, usually in the form of the ubiquitous brahmin, which gave them considerable power and influence within the young nation. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those so-called brahmin barons. [PAWN_pronoun] acquired much of [PAWN_possessive] extensive h老旧ings through questionable means, which usually involved bribery or blackmail.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Brahmin_Baron.title: NCR 婆罗门男爵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Citizen.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 是新加利福尼亚共和国公民。 [PAWN_pronoun] 维护共和国的价值观，例如民主、个人自由和法治，并希望将它们传播到整个荒地。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Citizen.title: NCR 公民
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Crimson_Caravan_Worker: [PAWN_nameDef] worked for the Crimson Caravan, one of the 老旧est and largest caravan outfits in the New California Republic. While the pay was good, [PAWN_pronoun] always dreamed of starting [PAWN_possessive] own caravan.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Disgruntled_Veteran.de: [PAWN_nameDef] 在 NCR 军队服役了一段时间，为共和国的价值观而战，或者 [PAWN_pronoun] 最初是这么想的……随着时间的推移，[PAWN_nameDef] 的幻想破灭了，因为 [PAWN_pronoun] 意识到 NCR 的行为往往是出于物质利益。 [PAWN_possessive] 服务结束后，[PAWN_pronoun] 没有重新入伍，因为 [PAWN_pronoun] 不再想参与 [PAWN_pronoun] 认为的帝国主义。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Doctor_a.description: [PAWN_nameDef] didn’t expect medicine to be this messy. When [PAWN_pronoun] signed up with the NCR, [PAWN_possessive] dreams were of clean clinics, careful surgeries, and patients who had a real chance at survival. Instead, [PAWN_pronoun] spent [PAWN_possessive] career digging bullets out of screaming s老旧iers, using whatever tools were on hand to keep them alive for just one more fight. The Republic’s wars never end, and neither does [PAWN_possessive] work.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Doctor_a.title: NCR 医生
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Doctor_b.description: To [PAWN_nameDef], the Republic isn’t about war, it’s about saving lives. [PAWN_pronoun] treats NCR s老旧iers, wastelanders, even captured enemies, because life is too precious to waste on petty politics. Many of [PAWN_possessive] fellow officers call [PAWN_pronoun] soft, but [PAWN_pronoun] believes that if the Republic truly stands for something, it should be compassion.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Doctor_b.title: NCR 医生
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Doctor_c.description: Before the NCR, [PAWN_nameDef] was a Scribe of the 钢铁兄弟会, trained in medical science. But [PAWN_pronoun] saw firsthand how the Brotherhood hoarded technology, refusing to use it to help the wasteland. That wasn’t good enough. [PAWN_pronoun] fled to the NCR, offering [PAWN_possessive] expertise to a faction that actually helped people. Some troopers still don’t trust [PAWN_pronoun], but [PAWN_possessive] skills have kept them alive too many times to ignore.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Doctor_c.title: NCR 医生
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Doctor_d.description: 在 NCR 之前，在共和国的战争机器之前，[PAWN_nameDef] 只是另一位荒地医生，从一个定居点搬到另一个定居点，为有能力支付费用的人提供治疗。最终，NCR 提出了 [PAWN_pronoun] 的条件，包括定期供应、安全保障和真正的工作场所。这不是一个艰难的选择。但即使是现在，[PAWN_pronoun]有时也会想知道共和国是否真的与[PAWN_pronoun]过去所回避的军阀有什么不同。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Doctor_d.title: NCR 医生
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Enthusiastic_Recruit.d: Since the day [PAWN_pronoun] could h老旧 a BB gun, [PAWN_nameDef] wanted to join the NCR Armed Forces. Much to the confusion of [PAWN_possessive] peers and parents [PAWN_nameDef] shunned playing with the other children, as well as book learning and preferred to sharpen [PAWN_possessive] aim instead.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Farmhand.description: 共和国的力量很大一部分来自于其大量的耕地。 [PAWN_nameDef] 在 [PAWN_possessive] 一生中的大部分时间都在农田工作，从一个农场到另一个农场帮助收割农作物，以确保 NCR 的稳定和繁荣。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Farmhand.title: NCR 农场工人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Field_Medic.descriptio: While [PAWN_pronoun] was a member of the NCR military, [PAWN_nameDef] didn’t join it to end lives, but to save them. [PAWN_nameDef] was a skilled field medic and saved many s老旧iers from certain death. However, [PAWN_pronoun] was not a very skilled fighter and relied on others when in battle.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Field_Medic.title: NCR 现场医疗兵
[PAWN_nameDef] 曾经是新加州共和国国会的成员。 [PAWN_pronoun] 是一位优秀、诚实的政治家，关心所有 [PAWN_possessive] 选民的福祉。不幸的是，[PAWN_pronoun]树敌了一些强大的敌人，即一些富有且有影响力的婆罗门贵族，他们最终成功地捏造了[PAWN_nameDef]的垮台和落选。这次经历让[PAWN_objective]感到沮丧和愤怒，足以让[PAWN_objective]永远离开[PAWN_possessive]城镇。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Gun_Runner_Artisan.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 曾为军火走私者（新加州共和国最大的武器制造商）担任工匠。军火走私者以臭名昭著的嫉妒心保护他们的设施，[PAWN_nameDef]也不例外。因此，[PAWN_pronoun] 很难信任其他人，因为 [PAWN_pronoun] 担心他们在寻找 [PAWN_possessive] 武器原理图。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_a.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] never wanted to be a s老旧ier, but [PAWN_pronoun] always wanted to protect people. In the Heavy Trooper corps, [PAWN_pronoun] found a way to do both. [PAWN_pronoun] has learned to use [PAWN_possessive] salvaged armor as a shield for [PAWN_possessive] squadmates, standing firm under fire so others can fight another day. The Republic may not be perfect, but as long as [PAWN_pronoun] is standing, [PAWN_pronoun] will keep it safe.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_a.title: NCR 重骑兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_b.descri: Heavy Troopers were trained to h老旧 the line, but [PAWN_nameDef] had a different idea, break the enemy’s line. Given salvaged power armor, [PAWN_possessive] first instinct was to charge, bringing close-range devastation to anyone too slow to run. [PAWN_pronoun] relishes the feeling of wading into a battlefield, taking shots that would kill normal troopers and coming out with nothing but dents. Some call [PAWN_pronoun] reckless. [PAWN_possessive] superiors just call [PAWN_pronoun] effective.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_b.title: NCR 重骑兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_c.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] 不应该持续下去。重型士兵的训练是残酷的，大多数人都会被淘汰。但凭借纯粹的固执，[PAWN_pronoun] 坚持了下来，无论 [PAWN_possessive] 身体失败了多少次，都拒绝放弃。多年后，[PAWN_possessive] 最初的训练师要么去世，要么退休，而 [PAWN_pronoun] 仍然在这里，仍然矗立着。 NCR 可能有缺陷，但它赋予了 [PAWN_pronoun] 一个目的，并且 [PAWN_pronoun] 不会放过它。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_c.title: NCR 重骑兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_d.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] should be dead by now. The NCR has sent [PAWN_pronoun] into some of the worst hellholes on the frontlines, and yet [PAWN_pronoun] keeps coming back. Some say it’s the armor. Some say it’s sheer luck. Whatever it is, [PAWN_possessive] reputation as an unkillable s老旧ier has made [PAWN_pronoun] both feared and respected. No matter how many battles come, [PAWN_pronoun] will fight until there’s nothing left.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_d.title: NCR 重骑兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_e.descri: 重装部队不仅仅与军团作战，他们还在边境执行 NCR 的统治。当外交失败时，重量级人物就会介入。[PAWN_nameDef]镇压了起义，解除了持不同政见者的武装，并镇压了任何认为自己可以反抗共和国的人。一些 NCR 官员不愿使用武力。 [PAWN_pronoun] 没有。如果人们不害怕违反共和国的法律，那么这些法律就毫无意义。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Heavy_Trooper_e.title: NCR 重骑兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Khan_Survivor.descript: 与[PAWN_nameDef]的朋友和家人不同，[PAWN_possessive]小时候在苦泉大屠杀中幸存下来。 [PAWN_pronoun] 首先被拘留，后来被 NCR 公民收养，他们像大多数 NCR 军队一样，避免与 [PAWN_objective] 谈论共和国历史上的这段黑暗篇章。相反，[PAWN_nameDef]学会了艺术地表达[PAWN_objective]自我，以应对[PAWN_possessive]创伤。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Khan_Survivor.title: 可汗幸存者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Manufacturers_Apprenti: 国家首都区边界沿线的许多冲突导致共和国军队不断需要新的装备和装备。 [PAWN_nameDef] 所在的工厂从这种近乎持续的战争状态中获得了巨大的利润。因此，按照后世界末日的标准，[PAWN_possessive]父母足够富有，能够负担高水平的生活。
As a fledgling nation, the NCR’s infrastructure was still largely underdeveloped. The many 工地s offered employment to countless migrant workers, moving from one place and project to another. [PAWN_nameDef] was born into this lifestyle. While [PAWN_pronoun] received little formal education, [PAWN_possessive] hardy upbringing meant [PAWN_pronoun] was better prepared for the life full of privations the wasteland offered than most other children.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Military_Police_Troope: [PAWN_nameDef] was a member of the NCR military police. It was [PAWN_possessive] duty to ensure discipline among the troops, as well as to punish those that violated the law. In turn, it was expected of [PAWN_objective] to lead by example. [PAWN_nameDef] was an exemplary s老旧ier, disciplined and loyal, but never really had the creativity and leadership qualities, that were necessary to rise up in rank.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Navarro_Survivor.descr: Until the sacking of Navarro at the hands of the NCR military, [PAWN_nameDef] was a member of the 英克雷. [PAWN_pronoun] was one of the few survivors of that battle. Separated from [PAWN_possessive] former comrades, [PAWN_nameDef] decided to lay low to escape the wrath of the NCR, taking work wherever [PAWN_pronoun] could find it and never staying long at one location. The skills [PAWN_nameDef] learned during [PAWN_possessive] time with the 英克雷 came in handy with many of the jobs [PAWN_pronoun] took over the years.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Navarro_Survivor.title: 纳瓦罗幸存者
纳瓦罗幸存者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Ne_er_do_well.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] 是 NCR 众多定居点之一的街头顽童。在[PAWN_possessive]生活的早期，[PAWN_pronoun]就很明显地适应了让[PAWN_objective]自己陷入麻烦，许多人认为[PAWN_pronoun]最终入狱只是时间问题。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Ne_er_do_well.title: 永远都做不好
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer.description: 成年后，[PAWN_nameDef] 加入了 NCR 武装部队，并因其近亲的政治任命而被授予军官军衔。尽管缺乏更多老兵和顽固军官的战斗经验或战术技能，[PAWN_pronoun]就像[PAWN_possessive]部队一样，知道如何与其他军官和政客交谈和说服，并且渴望学习。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer.title: NCR 官员
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_a.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 从来不想成为一名军官。在[PAWN_possessive]入伍初期，[PAWN_pronoun]只是战壕中的又一个咕噜声，躲避子弹和军团伏击，勉强幸存。但当[PAWN_possessive]指挥官倒台后，[PAWN_pronoun]出于必要而接管了指挥权。共和国授予 [PAWN_pronoun] 战场委托，从那时起，[PAWN_pronoun] 就一直在前线领导——无论 [PAWN_pronoun] 喜欢与否。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_a.title: NCR 官员
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_b.description: 外交是政治家的事，军官的存在是为了赢得战争。 [PAWN_nameDef] 对于那些放慢共和国扩张速度的温和谈判者或官僚没有耐心。 NCR 的目的是征服无法无天的荒野，为它们带来秩序。每场战斗都是扩大共和国影响力的机会，[PAWN_pronoun]不会让意志薄弱的傻瓜挡道。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_b.title: NCR 官员
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_c.description: NCR 宣扬正义和民主，但在这片荒原上，真正的权力来自于你认识的人和你控制的东西。 [PAWN_nameDef] 很早就了解到，在共和国蓬勃发展的最佳方式不是通过勇气，而是通过恩惠、贿赂和适当的威胁。军官级别只是控制共和国实际权力结构的又一步。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_c.title: NCR 官员
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_d.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 加入 NCR 并不是为了战斗，[PAWN_pronoun] 加入 NCR 是为了崛起。每一次战斗、每一次胜利、每一个战略决策都只是迈向更伟大事业的垫脚石。战争只是另一场政治游戏，[PAWN_pronoun] 想要获胜。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_d.title: NCR 官员
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_e.description: 兄弟会不收俘虏。当[PAWN_nameDef]带领一支巡逻队进入有争议的NCR领土时，该任务本应是一次简单的侦察行动。相反，它变成了一场屠杀。 [PAWN_pronoun] 勉强逃脱，而 [PAWN_possessive] 整个部队被兄弟会骑士的一个小队消灭了。 NCR 可能赢得了对他们的战争，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 更清楚，兄弟会并没有消失，只是隐藏起来，等待再次袭击。 [PAWN_pronoun] 也会等待。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_e.title: NCR 官员
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Officer_Offspring.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] 是 NCR 武装部队一名军官的孩子。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 接受了只有少数特权人士才能享受的教育，但由于 [PAWN_pronoun] 父母的高期望，[PAWN_possessive] 承受着很大的压力。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Pioneer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 住在 NCR，但搬到了其边境地区建立了新的定居点。 [PAWN_pronoun] 拥有在荒地建立新社区的所有必要技能。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Pioneer.title: NCR先锋
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Plantation_Child.descr: 国家首都区遍布着种植园，那里没有灌溉且缺乏辐射，可以种植农作物。共和国在那里生产了大量耐寒植物的食物，如玉米或土豆，以养活饥饿的定居点。 [PAWN_nameDef] 出生在其中一个种植园，从小就学会了如何照料农作物。 [PAWN_possessive]相对平静的成长环境意味着[PAWN_pronoun]缺乏许多生存技能。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Plantation_Child.title: 种植园的孩子
种植园的孩子
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Private.description: Upon reaching adulthood, [PAWN_nameDef] joined the NCR armed forces and was awarded the rank of private. Despite lacking the combat experience of more senior s老旧iers, [PAWN_pronoun] is decent with a gun, knows how to build basic defensive structures, like barricades or sandbags and knows a thing or two about first aid.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Private.title: NCR 私人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Quarry_worker.descript: NCR已经养成了在边界沿线的战略位置建造防御工事和掩体的习惯。然而，要做到这一点，他们需要大量的石头来制造水泥，而水泥又需要首先开采。 [PAWN_nameDef] 在 NCR 领土内外的众多采石场之一工作。这是一份艰苦、劳累的工作，但报酬不错，这对 [PAWN_pronoun] 来说才是最重要的。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Quarry_worker.title: 采石场工人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Quartermaster.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] was a quartermaster in the NCR military. [PAWN_pronoun] was tasked with keeping track of provisions for the s老旧iers. As the NCR military was notoriously undersupplied [PAWN_pronoun] got used to negotiate over every piece of equipment, both with fellow members of the NCR, as well as with outsiders who often were a reliable source of supplies.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Quartermaster.title: NCR 军需官
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Raised_by_Followers.de: [PAWN_nameDef] 是在天启追随者的前哨基地中长大的。追随者尽最大努力保护[PAWN_objective]免受荒地的危险，并接受[PAWN_objective]许多学科的教育，从医学到社会学。虽然[PAWN_nameDef]成为许多领域的专家，但[PAWN_possessive]养父母的人文理想使[PAWN_objective]成为坚定的和平主义者。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Rancher.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 是一名牧场主，照顾婆罗门和大角牛。 [PAWN_pronoun] 很喜欢动物，但不太喜欢人类，比起其他人类，更喜欢牲畜的陪伴，更喜欢平原的孤独，而不是熙熙攘攘的定居点。 [PAWN_pronoun] 还拥有一些战斗能力，这是通过保护 [PAWN_possessive] 牛群免受窃贼侵害而获得的。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Rancher.title: NCR牧场主
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Ranger.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 是 NCR 精锐战斗部队游骑兵的一部分。因此，[PAWN_pronoun] 擅长战斗，并且拥有相当多的其他生存技能，这要归功于在莫哈韦沙漠及其周边地区的多年服役。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Ranger.title: NCR游骑兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Rangers_Child.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生为一名 NCR 护林员的孩子。 [PAWN_pronoun] 的大部分 [PAWN_possessive] 童年时光是在 NCR 领土腹地某处的偏远游骑兵前哨基地度过的。 [PAWN_nameDef] was a skilled survivalist indeed, but never got used to large crowds of people due to the isolated location of [PAWN_possessive] birthplace.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Rangers_Child.title: 游骑兵的孩子
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Re_educated_Raider_Kid: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生于一个掠夺团伙，该团伙的领地位于 NCR 内。在 NCR 掠夺者战争期间，共和国的大多数掠夺者团体要么被消灭，要么被驱逐，[PAWN_pronoun] 被俘虏。共和国在[PAWN_nameDef]的再教育上投入了大量精力，但[PAWN_pronoun]从未成功摆脱[PAWN_pronoun]作为掠夺者所学到的一切，并且仍然有些不驯服和野蛮。
重新接受教育的掠夺者小子
重新接受教育的掠夺者小子
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Recon_Trooper.descript: 作为侦察队的一员，[PAWN_nameDef] 是一名熟练的狙击手。 When not on reconnaissance missions, [PAWN_possessive] squad was usually deployed to take out enemy commanders or leaders, often tipping the scale in the ongoing conflict between the NCR and whatever foe tried to stand in their way.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Recon_Trooper.title: NCR 侦察兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Republic_Born.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] was born in the New California Republic. Unlike many children in other parts of the wasteland, [PAWN_pronoun] received basic education at a school, where [PAWN_pronoun] learned to write and read, as well as the history of the republic. [PAWN_possessive] parents were proud of their NCR origin and taught [PAWN_objective] to uph老旧 the republic’s values.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Republic_Born.title: 共和国诞生
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Republic_Migrant.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] parents moved to the NCR while [PAWN_pronoun] was a s商场 child, seeking a better life within the republic. At first, they had some troubles adapting to their new surroundings and its society but eventually the family learned to value life in the NCR, albeit they never quite grew accustomed to paying taxes.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Republic_Migrant.title: 共和国移民
共和国移民
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Road_Worker.descriptio: 随着国家首都区的发展，对连接城镇和定居点的道路的需求也在增加。 [PAWN_nameDef]以道路工人为生，在荒地无情的阳光下劳作，以确保商队能够到达所有需要货物的定居点。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 由于 [PAWN_possessive] 繁重的工作而相当强大，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 从来都不是一个书本学习者。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Road_Worker.title: NCR 道路工人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Scientist_a.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] was once a scientist for the 英克雷, part of a classified research division dedicated to advancing pre-war technology. But the deeper [PAWN_pronoun] dug, the clearer it became, the 英克雷 wasn’t saving America. It was dooming it all over again. When the NCR pushed into 英克雷 held territory, [PAWN_pronoun] saw a chance to escape and took it. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] uses [PAWN_possessive] knowledge to help the Republic, though some still don’t trust a former 英克雷 scientist.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Scientist_a.title: NCR 科学家
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Scientist_b.descriptio: NCR 不能仅靠数量上战胜敌人来赢得战争，而是靠火力取胜。这就是 [PAWN_nameDef] 发挥作用的地方。[PAWN_pronoun] 花费了 [PAWN_possessive] 整个职业生涯来开发更好的枪支、更好的炸药和更致命的方法，以确保共和国的统治地位。有些人称 [PAWN_pronoun] 的工作残酷无情，但当 NCR 重装部队用等离子武器冲破敌人防线时，他们并没有抱怨。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Scientist_b.title: NCR 科学家
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Scientist_c.descriptio: 荒地是一个充满敌意、变异的地方，[PAWN_nameDef]花了[PAWN_possessive]一生来研究它。从 FEV 毒株到攻击性辐射蝎，[PAWN_pronoun] 将世界视为科学进步的试验台。共和国不赞成 [PAWN_possessive] 实验，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 知道最强者才能生存，科学必须自由地突破界限。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Scientist_c.title: NCR 科学家
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Scientist_d.descriptio: The 钢铁兄弟会 sees technology as a treasure to be hoarded. [PAWN_nameDef] saw it as a tool for progress. When the NCR went to war with the Brotherhood, [PAWN_pronoun] made a choice, defect and share [PAWN_possessive] knowledge with the Republic. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] works in NCR research labs, studying power armor, energy weapons, and other Brotherhood 秘密s.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Scientist_d.title: NCR 科学家
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Scientist_e.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] was born in a vault, one of the few still operating when the NCR came knocking. The Republic took control, offering [PAWN_pronoun] a chance to put [PAWN_possessive] skills to use for something greater. [PAWN_pronoun] accepted, eager to study the wasteland firsthand. The surface world is 危险, unpredictable, and full of scientific wonders.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Scientist_e.title: NCR 科学家
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Settled_Tribal.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] 出生于一个部落社会，居住在 NCR 领土内。在[PAWN_possessive]童年的某个时刻，部落得到了平定并融入了共和国社会。虽然并非所有部落成员都赞成强加给他们的新生活方式，但 [PAWN_nameDef] 对 NCR 公民“现代”生活的可能性着迷。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Settled_Tribal.title: 定居部落
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Sheriff.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was elected as a Sheriff in a s商场 town that was part of the New California Republic. [PAWN_pronoun] couldn’t enforce law and order as independently as the Sheriffs of non-republic settlements, but still held a lot of influence in [PAWN_possessive] town and most of its inhabitants looked up to [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Sheriff.title: NCR 警长
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Squatter.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 是一名擅自占地者，跟随 NCR 军队在最近合并的地区寻找定居点并建立新生活。这些地区的许多居民对这些擅自占地者并不看好，因此 [PAWN_pronoun] 必须提防愤怒的当地人的影响。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Squatter.title: NCR 擅自占地者
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Tax_Collector.descript: 虽然大多数人赞赏国家首都区为其公民提供的服务和保护，但为支付这些东西而征收的税收却不太受欢迎。以加州政府的名义来征收这些税款的人同样不受欢迎，但 [PAWN_nameDef] 无论如何都对 [PAWN_possessive] 的工作感到自豪。 [PAWN_pronoun] 并不完全是一名战士，他依靠言语或武装护送来对付那些不愿意支付自己份额的人，以及那些勇敢或愚蠢地试图窃取 [PAWN_possessive] 金库的少数无赖。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Tax_Collector.title: NCR 税务员
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_a.description: 当 [PAWN_nameDef] 加入 NCR 军队时，[PAWN_pronoun] 真正相信自己的使命：为荒地带来秩序、民主和正义。但多年的前线经历考验了这种信念。腐败的军官、补给短缺以及针对军团的残酷游击战让[PAWN_pronoun]质疑共和国能否真正为这片荒地带来和平。尽管如此，[PAWN_possessive] 的职责还没有完成。如果 NCR 有缺陷，那么 [PAWN_nameDef] 将努力使其变得更好。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_a.title: NCR 士兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_b.description: [PAWN_nameDef] 勉强通过了训练，每个人都知道这一点。 [PAWN_pronoun] 身体不好，没有纪律，几乎无法遵守命令，应该被踢出去。但 NCR 需要尸体，因此 [PAWN_pronoun] 获得了一支步枪并被派往前线。现在，[PAWN_pronoun] 花更多时间躲避巡逻而不是战斗，希望能活得足够长，最好在所有 [PAWN_possessive] 四肢完好无损的情况下退役。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_b.title: NCR 士兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_c.description: [PAWN_nameDef] didn’t join for patriotism. [PAWN_pronoun] joined because it was a paycheck. The NCR Army provides food, gear, and a chance to loot whatever’s left on the battlefield. Sure, the work is 危险, but [PAWN_pronoun] knows that war isn’t about ideals, it’s about survival. And if the Republic ever stops paying, well… there’s always someone else willing to hire a s老旧ier with experience.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_c.title: NCR 士兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_d.description: 在 NCR 之前，[PAWN_nameDef] 靠掠夺者代码为生，拿走你想要的东西，杀掉你需要的人，并且永不回头。但袭击团伙不会永远存在，当 [PAWN_possessive] 成员被 NCR 巡逻队消灭时，[PAWN_pronoun] 有两个选择：子弹或制服。军队的纪律一开始令人窒息，但随着时间的推移，[PAWN_pronoun]发现[PAWN_possessive]技能在这里占有一席之地。杀戮终究是杀戮，谁真的重要吗？
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_d.title: NCR 士兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_e.description: The first time [PAWN_nameDef] saw an NCR s老旧ier, [PAWN_pronoun] thought [PAWN_pronoun] was about to die. Instead, they cut [PAWN_pronoun] free. Born into Legion slavery, [PAWN_possessive] entire life had been toil and punishment. The idea of freedom was as foreign as the land beyond [PAWN_possessive] camp. When the NCR offered a new life in the army, [PAWN_pronoun] accepted—partly out of gratitude, partly because [PAWN_pronoun] didn’t know how to live any other way.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_e.title: NCR 士兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_f.description: [PAWN_nameDef] joined the NCR not as a fighter, but as an engineer, working to maintain vehicles, fortifications, and energy grids. But when battles started turning against the Republic, every warm body was given a rifle including [PAWN_pronoun]. Now, [PAWN_pronoun] fights alongside the same s老旧iers [PAWN_pronoun] used to support, struggling to balance the c老旧 logic of engineering with the chaotic brutality of war.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Trooper_f.title: NCR 士兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Van_Graff_Thug.descrip: 尽管范格拉夫家族试图以合法商人的身份出现，但他们却更像一个犯罪集团。 [PAWN_nameDef] 为范格拉夫家族当了相当长一段时间的暴徒，并接受了广泛的能量武器训练，范格拉夫家族是其中的主要经销商。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 并不像 [PAWN_possessive] 雇主那样肆无忌惮，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 仍然愿意承担许多其他更有道德的人不敢做的任务。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Van_Graff_Thug.title: 范·格拉夫暴徒
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCRCF_Inmate.description: 随着NCR地区法律和秩序的恢复，惩教设施或通常所说的监狱也卷土重来。 [PAWN_nameDef] 经常陷入麻烦，最终落到法官面前。 [PAWN_pronoun] 被监禁了一段时间，但最终被释放。虽然这并不是一次令人愉快的经历，但 [PAWN_nameDef] 在监狱中学到了一套新技能，其中许多技能即使不在监狱里也被证明是有用的。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCRCF_Inmate.title: NCRCF 囚犯
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Colonel_A.bas: 他曾经是一名获得勋章的 NCR 上校，如今却以冷酷无情的效率带领着逃兵，在荒地上开疆拓土。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Colonel_B.bas: 这位上校以其战场战术而闻名，因不服从命令而被流放，现在指挥着一支流氓军队。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Colonel_C.bas: 怀着建立新秩序的愿景，这位上校抛弃了 NCR，成为废土流放者中令人畏惧的军阀。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Colonel_D.bas: 这位曾经受人尊敬的上校后来失宠，导致他聚集逃兵，在荒原上开辟了一条新道路。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Colonel_E.bas: 这位经验丰富、雄心勃勃的上校抛弃了指挥雇佣兵的方式，开创了自己的事业。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Officer_A.bas: 他曾经是一名 NCR 警官，利用自己的军衔谋取私利，直到他的罪行被发现。现在他在荒原上带领着逃兵。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Officer_B.bas: 由于对 NCR 的领导不力感到沮丧，这名军官选择开小差，将自己的战术技能更好地运用到流氓队伍中。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Officer_C.bas: 这位指挥官因质疑命令而被驱逐，现在带领逃兵与前盟友和敌人作战。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Officer_D.bas: 这位擅长谈判的军官为了新派系的生存而放弃了斡旋交易和联盟。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Officer_E.bas: 在向 NCR 复仇的驱使下，这位队长开小差，领导攻击他以前的战友并伸张正义。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Trooper_A.bas: 他曾经是一名忠诚的 NCR 士兵，但对无休止的竞选活动和腐败的军官感到厌倦。现在，他与逃兵同伴一起为生存而战。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Trooper_B.bas: 这位士兵在战斗中受伤并被指挥部遗弃，为了逃离一个不再关心自己的系统而逃亡。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Trooper_C.bas: 这位侦察兵擅长在荒地中航行，他离开了 NCR，利用自己的才能谋求自己的生存和利益。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Trooper_D.bas: 怀揣着致富梦想，这位士兵放弃了 NCR，成为一名雇佣枪手，将自己的技能卖给出价最高的人。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Deserter_Trooper_E.bas: Once tasked with protecting NCR assets, a single mistake led to disgrace and desertion.现在他在被遗弃的人中寻求救赎。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Ambassador_Crocker_Adu: [PAWN_nameDef] 担任 NCR 驻新维加斯大使，负责维持外交关系并推进共和国在莫哈韦的利益。 [PAWN_pronoun] 擅长驾驭复杂的政治局势。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Ambassador_Crocker_Chi: [PAWN_nameDef] 在 NCR 首都长大，看着 [PAWN_possessive] 父母在战后复杂的政治世界中游刃有余。 [PAWN_pronoun] 对谈判和妥协有了敏锐的理解。
[PAWN_nameDef] 是 OSI 的植物学家，研究农业技术以帮助养活 NCR 不断增长的人口。 [PAWN_pronoun] 对工作充满热情，但担心希尔登鲁莽的方法。
[PAWN_nameDef] 从小就从 [PAWN_possessive] 父母那里学习植物学和农业。 [PAWN_pronoun] 对战前农业科学如何帮助养活不断增长的 NCR 人口感到着迷。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Captain_Curtis.baseDes: [PAWN_nameDef] 管理麦卡伦营地的补给行动，确保部队获得必要的装备。尽管官方资源有限，[PAWN_pronoun] 仍擅长采购和“创意”后勤以满足需求。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Captain_Curtis.title: 麦卡伦供应官
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Captain_Curtis_Child.b: [PAWN_nameDef] 从小就帮助 [PAWN_possessive] 父母经营一个贸易站，从小就了解物资的价值和高效的资源管理。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Captain_Gilles_Adult.b: [PAWN_nameDef] 指挥莫哈韦关键 NCR 设施的驻军，平衡安全需求与有限资源。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Captain_Gilles_Child.b: [PAWN_nameDef] 在 NCR 首府 Shady Sands 长大。 [PAWN_pronoun] 在共和国的民主和扩张理想的包围下长大。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Captain_Parker_Adult.b: [PAWN_nameDef] 担任 NCR 军队的步兵上尉，带领部队参加了多次对抗袭击者、部落和敌对派系的战斗。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Captain_Parker_Child.b: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up on a farm in NCR territory, learning to work hard and shoot straight. [PAWN_pronoun] enlisted as soon as [PAWN_pronoun] was 老旧 enough.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Captain_Rodriguez.base: [PAWN_nameDef] 指挥一支 NCR 部队与共和国隔绝了十多年。 [PAWN_pronoun] 尽管孤立无援，但仍保持纪律和希望，通过纯粹的意志和领导力使 [PAWN_possessive] 部队团结在一起。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Captain_Rodriguez_Chil: [PAWN_nameDef] 在 NCR 领土的中心长大，很早就了解了责任、毅力以及维持荒地秩序的挑战。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Chief_Hanlon_Adult.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] 成为一名传奇的 NCR 游骑兵，几十年来表现出色。作为游骑兵酋长，[PAWN_pronoun] 在第一次战役期间领导了胡佛水坝的防御，但对无休止的战争感到失望。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Chief_Hanlon_Child.bas: [PAWN_nameDef] 在年轻时就因袭击者失去了 [PAWN_possessive] 父母。 [PAWN_pronoun] 被 NCR Rangers 收留，成为 [PAWN_possessive] 新家庭。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Colonel_Hsu_Adult.base: [PAWN_nameDef] 担任麦卡伦营指挥官，管理着莫哈韦沙漠的数千名士兵。 [PAWN_pronoun] 赢得了对 [PAWN_possessive] 公平性和战术能力的尊重。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Colonel_Hsu_Child.base: [PAWN_nameDef] 在枢纽长大，这里是 NCR 的核心领地之一。 [PAWN_pronoun]见证了共和国成长过程中的繁荣和挑战，激励[PAWN_objective]服务。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Colonel_Moore_Adult.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] 成为 NCR 最具侵略性的指挥官之一，驻扎在胡佛水坝。 [PAWN_pronoun] 相信彻底的胜利，不容忍软弱或妥协。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Colonel_Moore_Child.ba: [PAWN_nameDef] 从小就坚信 NCR 的使命是为荒地带来秩序。 [PAWN_pronoun] 了解到力量和决心是生存的关键。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Gaines_Ad: [PAWN_nameDef] 协调莫哈韦 NCR 行动的军事通信，管理多个渠道并确保高效的信息流。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Gaines_Ch: [PAWN_nameDef] 就读于 NCR 军事学院，表现出沟通和协调能力，这使 [PAWN_objective] 有别于其他学生。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Grant_Adu: [PAWN_nameDef] 管理 NCR 部队的现场通信、建立移动无线电台并在行动期间与指挥部保持联系。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Grant_Chi: [PAWN_nameDef] 担任 NCR 定居点之间的消息传递者，了解清晰准确沟通的重要性。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Lenk_Adul: [PAWN_nameDef] 管理莫哈韦 NCR 部队的通信，协调无线电流量并确保消息到达目的地。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Lenk_Chil: [PAWN_nameDef] was fascinated by radio technology from a young age, tinkering with 老旧 equipment and learning how communications worked in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Pappas_Ad: [PAWN_nameDef] 维护和操作 NCR 无线电设备，确保即使在恶劣的荒地条件下通信也能保持功能。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Pappas_Ch: [PAWN_nameDef] scavenged pre-war technology with [PAWN_possessive] family, learning how 老旧 communications equipment worked and how to repair it.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Richards_: [PAWN_nameDef] 专门从事 NCR 军队的信号操作，管理安全通信和加密协议。
[PAWN_nameDef] 向一名 NCR 老兵学习了信号通信，研究了后来为 [PAWN_objective] 服务的代码和无线电程序。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Stepinac_: [PAWN_nameDef] 管理 NCR 通信设备的维护和修理，确保重要的无线电网络保持运行。
[PAWN_nameDef] 帮助 [PAWN_possessive] 监护人维护 NCR 通信设备，学习无线电操作的技术方面。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Stone_Adu: [PAWN_nameDef] 监督 NCR 军事单位的通信调度，管理应急通信并协调快速响应。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Stone_Chi: [PAWN_nameDef] 从 [PAWN_possessive] 父母那里学会了通讯，他们为 NCR 前哨站操作电报和无线电设备。 [PAWN_pronoun]伴随着莫尔斯电码的点击声长大。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Traci_Adu: [PAWN_nameDef] 专门从事战术通信，在战斗行动期间协调 NCR 部队的实时战场通信。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Comm_Officer_Traci_Chi: [PAWN_nameDef] 接受过 NCR 大篷车调度员培训，学习如何有效地协调行动和传递信息。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Corporal_Betsy_Adult.b: [PAWN_nameDef] 在第一侦察队的阿尔法小队担任观察员。在与恶魔厨师库克经历了一次痛苦的遭遇后，[PAWN_pronoun] 挣扎但仍然坚定。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Corporal_Betsy_Child.b: [PAWN_nameDef] 在 NCR 领土边缘长大，学习如何处理来自袭击者和野生动物的威胁。 [PAWN_pronoun] 入伍是为了帮助保护他人。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Corporal_Hornsby_Adult: [PAWN_nameDef] 在麦卡伦营的 NCR 宪兵服役，负责维持部队秩序并调查部队中的犯罪行为。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_NCR_Corporal_Hornsby_Child: [PAWN_nameDef] 青少年时期就读于 NCR 军事学院，学习纪律和战斗技能。 [PAWN_pronoun] 擅长执行命令。
