Growing up, [PAWN_nameDef] was always taking chances—whether it was sneaking into forbidden 废墟s, betting bottle caps on two-headed ant races, or trading scavenged goods for a shot at something better. [PAWN_pronoun] learned early that luck could be as valuable as skill, and [PAWN_pronoun] was quick to make friends (and the occasional enemy) wherever [PAWN_pronoun] roamed. Every close call was just another story to tell around the campfire.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Trapper_Offspr: While most of the remaining wildlife of the wasteland was extremely 危险, not to mention irradiated, the general scarcity of foodstuffs ensured that their meat was in high demand. [PAWN_nameDef]’s parents made a living from trapping various s商场er animals with shoddy contraptions, a trade which was rightfully viewed as a less 危险 method than hunting.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Tribal_Child.d: [PAWN_nameDef]诞生于荒地中出现的众多部落社会之一。该部落在技术和组织方面所缺乏的，却用独创性和适应性来弥补。这些特征确保了这个部落能够在其他部落可能灭亡的地方勉强维持生计。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wandering_Prie: Although most people in the wasteland didn’t have the luxury of free time to ask themselves existential or theological questions, there were exceptions. [PAWN_nameDef] was a wandering priest, traveling from town to town. [PAWN_possessive] goal never was to convert the people of the wasteland to a specific faith, but to give them hope thru giving them something to believe in. [PAWN_nameDef] never got a proper theological education and pasted [PAWN_possessive] faith together from various scriptures [PAWN_pronoun] found in 老旧 churches and other temples.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Arti: Unusual for an inhabitant of the wasteland, [PAWN_nameDef] always had an eye for aesthetics. While most other wastelanders didn’t mind living in 废墟ed pre-war buildings, [PAWN_nameDef] preferred to decorate [PAWN_possessive] dwelling with pieces of art, either self-made or scavenged ones.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Boun: [PAWN_nameDef] took on the 危险 profession of hunting criminals in a largely lawless world. The transition between bounty hunter and mercenary was often smooth and unclear, but [PAWN_pronoun] to think of [PAWN_objective]self as a bringer of law, judge, jury and executioner.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Butc: 像[PAWN_possessive]父亲一样，[PAWN_nameDef]也成为了一名屠夫。生活在后世界末日荒原上的绝大多数人不能挑剔食物的选择，[PAWN_nameDef] 也不能挑剔宰杀什么并卖给 [PAWN_possessive] 顾客。蟑螂、鼹鼠、松鼠、蝇和鬣蜥是较便宜的食物。婆罗门和大角羊肉通常是为那些口味精致的人准备的。当然还有必要的上限。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Farm: [PAWN_nameDef] 是一名农民。这片贫瘠、经常受到辐射的荒地土壤上长不出多少庄稼，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 勉强度日。可悲的是，[PAWN_nameDef]从未接受过适当的教育并且仍然是文盲。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Hook: Unlike other aspects of life before the great war, like sanitation or education, prostitution remained a staple of post-war economy. [PAWN_nameDef] didn’t chose [PAWN_possessive] profession out of desire, but out of need, as it proved to be a comparatively easy way to get by. Sure, [PAWN_pronoun] had to deal with stingy and intrusive costumers every once in a while, but it surely beat scrounging around in some ghoul-infested 废墟s for supplies, at least for [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Mayo: While most s商场er settlements in the wasteland were ruled over by the town’s sheriff, some of the larger one’s had a mayor, who may or may not have been elected democratically. [PAWN_nameDef] was one of those mayors and while [PAWN_pronoun] enjoyed the benefits of the office, [PAWN_pronoun] deeply cared for the members of [PAWN_possessive] community.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Quac: [PAWN_nameDef] 并不是在荒原上闲逛的最诚实的人之一。 [PAWN_pronoun] 以从一个死水定居点到文本地旅行为生，出售长生不老药和具有奇妙品质的混合物，或者 [PAWN_pronoun] 声称......非常重要的是，[PAWN_pronoun 在其居民发现这个计划之前就已经离开了一个定居点。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wasteland_Teac: In a world were few had the time and means to educate themselves, [PAWN_nameDef] took it upon [PAWN_objective]self to teach the children of [PAWN_possessive] community how to write, read and count as well as anything else [PAWN_pronoun] could find 老旧 books about. History, however, was a subject [PAWN_nameDef] avoided, too little did [PAWN_pronoun] know about it and too depressing were the few scraps of knowledge [PAWN_pronoun] managed to paste together.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Water_Merchant: 由于大部分荒地干旱且受到辐射，干净的水是一种宝贵的商品。 [PAWN_nameDef] 是一名专门从事水贸易的商人，将水从水源地运送到荒地中饥渴的定居点。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Water_Purifier: Since clean water was precious in most parts of the wasteland, water purifiers often decided over the live and death of a settlement. Due to [PAWN_possessive] moderate understanding of this incredibly important machine, [PAWN_nameDef] was assigned to look after it. To do that properly [PAWN_pronoun] often had to improvise while repairing the water purifier, as the 老旧 machine was prone to malfunctions and spare parts were rare.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Weapon_Artisan: 荒地及其许多居民（包括野兽和人类）的敌意使得制造和维护武器的能力变得不可或缺。 [PAWN_nameDef]拥有这份天赋并用它来照顾[PAWN_possessive]社区的装备。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Westside_Child: [PAWN_nameDef] has seen things no child should see during [PAWN_possessive] upbringing in the outer 城区s of New Vegas. Westside always was a cesspool of vice and violence and unlike many others [PAWN_nameDef] survived long enough to get out of it, albeit it left its marks on [PAWN_objective]. [PAWN_pronoun] learned a thing or two from the local gang, the Kings.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Whorehouse_Kid: Prostitution proved to be not only one of the 老旧est businesses of humanity, but also one of the most resilient. The practice survived the apocalypse and thrived in the wasteland. [PAWN_nameDef] was born in the surroundings of a brothel. While this upbringing might have been dubious in nature, it was also relatively safe, as brothels and whorehouses were usually well guarded and defended. [PAWN_pronoun] learned a lot about human nature and their interactions with each other while observing the clients.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_Wastelander_Wild_Child.des: [PAWN_nameDef] 独自在荒野中长大。 [PAWN_possessive] 唯一的同伴是动物，而 [PAWN_pronoun] 从未学会写字和阅读。虽然 [PAWN_pronoun] 自从 [PAWN_possessive] 在野外生活以来就与其他人类接触，但 [PAWN_pronoun] 仍然没有任何社交技能，但很少有荒地居民像 [PAWN_pronoun] 那样了解荒野生存。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_US_Navy_Marine_Corpsman.de: 为战场上受伤的海军陆战队员提供紧急医疗护理。这位医护兵接受过伤员分类、急救和战地医学方面的培训，在战火中拯救了生命。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Alaska_Scout.desc: Served as a scout in Alaska, navigating treacherous terrain and gathering intelligence on enemy movements. Skilled in stealth, navigation, and survival in extreme c老旧.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Alaska_Winter_War: Trained and deployed in the harsh Alaskan wilderness, this s老旧ier specialized in winter warfare, survival, and reconnaissance. Endured freezing temperatures and blizzards while defending the frontier against enemy incursions.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Aviation_Mechanic: 这位机械师负责维护和修理军用飞机，使垂直鸟、喷气式飞机和轰炸机保持最佳状态。他们的技术专长确保了安全飞行和任务成功。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Bomber_Pilot.desc: 驾驶重型轰炸机执行战略任务，向敌后深处投送毁灭性的有效载荷。他们在压力下的冷静以及与船员的团队合作对于生存和成功至关重要。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Captain.descripti: As a company commander, this captain managed logistics, training, and combat operations for dozens of s老旧iers. Their experience in both administration and battle forged a strong, adaptable leader.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Captain.title: 美国陆军上尉
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Colonel.descripti: Commanding a regiment, this colonel was responsible for hundreds of s老旧iers and the execution of large-scale operations. Their leadership and tactical acumen shaped the course of battles and the fate of their men.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Colonel.title: 美国陆军上校
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Communications_Te: 维护和操作保持单位连接的无线电和电子设备。该技术人员擅长故障排除、修复和加密，对于协调和情报至关重要。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Cook.description: Prepared meals for s老旧iers in camps and on the front lines. Adapted recipes to limited supplies and kept morale high with hot food, even in the worst conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Cook.title: 美国陆军野战厨师
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_General.descripti: 这位将军是战前美国陆军最高级别的军官之一，指挥整个师并制定军事政策。他们的战略远见和指挥能力具有传奇色彩，影响了国家最大冲突的结果。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_General.title: 美国陆军上将
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Infantry.descript: Served as a foot s老旧ier in the United States Army before the Great War. Trained in marksmanship, tactics, and survival, this s老旧ier saw action in several major conflicts and learned the value of discipline, teamwork, and perseverance under fire.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Infantry.title: 美国陆军步兵
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Infantry_Conscrip: 这名应征入伍者是在炸弹落下前的最后几年应征入伍的，在被派往前线之前只接受了基本训练。他们的经历充满了困惑、恐惧和绝望的求生意志。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Infantry_Radio_Op: 这位无线电操作员负责维持战场上的通信，在火力下传递命令并呼叫支援。他们的技术能力和敏捷的思维往往决定着胜利与失败。
美国陆军无线电操作员
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Infantry_Scout.de: 这种侦察兵专门从事侦察和秘密行动，在主力部队之前行动，收集情报并报告敌人的位置。他们的训练重点是生存、导航和观察。
这位经验丰富的步兵经历了多次服役，在多年的战斗中变得更加坚强。他们的城市战和堑壕战经验使他们足智多谋、坚韧不拔，对战场战术有着深刻的理解。
美国陆军步兵退伍军人
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Jet_Pilot.descrip: 驾驶高速喷气式战斗机保卫美国。这位飞行员擅长空中格斗、导航和快速决策，是一位空中大师。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Jet_Pilot.title: 美国喷气式战斗机飞行员
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Lieutenant.descri: Commissioned as a junior officer, this lieutenant led a platoon through the chaos of the pre-war years. Responsible for the welfare and discipline of their s老旧iers, they learned leadership under fire and the importance of quick decision-making.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Lieutenant.title: 美国陆军中尉
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Logistics_Special: 管理维持军队前进的补给线和资源。这位专家擅长组织、库存和解决问题，确保部队拥有生存和胜利所需的装备和给养。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Major.description: 该专业负责监督营级行动，协调复杂的任务并管理军官和士兵。他们的战略思维和组织能力对于战前的军事机器至关重要。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Major.title: 美国陆军少校
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Mechanic.descript: 让军队的车辆在最恶劣的条件下运行。这位机械师接受过维修和保养方面的培训，可以修理从吉普车到坦克的任何东西，通常是在战火中或在野外。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Mechanic.title: 美国陆军车辆机械师
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Medic.description: Provided medical care and triage for wounded s老旧iers. Trained in emergency medicine and battlefield first aid, this medic saved lives under fire and in field hospitals.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Medic.title: 美国陆军军医
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Vertibird_Pilot.d: 这位飞行员接受过驾驶先进的飞鸟运输机和武装直升机的训练，精通部队部署和空战。他们的快速反应和钢铁般的意志使他们在高风险任务中发挥着无价的作用。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Giddyup_Buttercu: 收集 Giddyup Buttercup 的每个模型，将它们安排在精心设计的马厩中，并与朋友一起比赛。培养了对玩具的热爱和创造性游戏的技巧。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Hubris_Comics_Dr: 参加 Hubris Comics 绘画比赛，发送超级英雄和怪物的草图。富有艺术感和想象力，总是在作业的边缘乱涂乱画。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Hubris_Comics_Su: 阅读了每一期《野蛮人格格纳克》和《势不可挡》，绘制自己的漫画并与朋友交流故事。富有想象力，随时准备冒险。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Nuka_Cola_Junior: 梦想赢得核子可乐抽奖，并在当地的汽水店品尝了每种口味。培养了敏锐的味觉和对朗朗上口的歌曲的热爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Nuka_World_Arcad: 在 Nuka-World 游乐场度过数小时，掌握每款游戏并收集奖品门票。培养快速反应能力和竞争精神。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_NukaWorld_Junior: 每年夏天都会参观核子世界，收集每个区域的地图和徽章。学会在人群中穿行、解决谜题，并总能找到最近的冷饮柜。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Poseidon_Energy_: 受到波塞冬能源广告的启发，带着自制反应堆和太阳能电池板进入每个科学博览会。好奇心强、富有创造力，总是问“如果会怎样？”
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Prewar_Schoolkid: 就读于一所热闹的战前学校，学习科学、历史和原子安全。很快就能结交朋友，并且总是渴望学习新东西。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Red_Menace_Carto: 观看了《红色威胁》动画片的每一集，记住了流行语并重演了与朋友的战斗。培养了戏剧天赋和对英雄的热爱。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Red_Menace_Fan.d: 收集了每一期《红色威胁》，对着镜子练习英雄姿势。富有想象力和爱国精神，随时准备在附近发现“共产党”。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Red_Rocket_Junio: 下午在车库里帮忙修理自行车和玩具车。学习了工具、团队合作的基础知识以及出色完成工作的满足感。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_RobCo_Junior_Tin: 花了几个下午的时间拆开玩具并试图修理家里的巧手先生。好奇心强、富有创造力，对小玩意和小玩意有独到的见解。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Silver_Shroud_Fa: 收听《银色裹尸布》的每一集广播节目，并与朋友们一起重演英勇的战斗。受到正义的启发，随时准备帮助他人。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Suburban_Gardene: Helped parents tend the backyard garden, learning the 秘密s of tomatoes and sunflowers. Developed patience and a green thumb.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Suburban_Scout.d: 周末露营，获得功绩徽章，并学习原子安全演习。知道如何打结和生篝火，甚至在汉迪先生的帮助下也是如此。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Sugar_Bombs_Enth: 每天早上从一碗糖弹和一档银色裹尸布广播节目开始。精力充沛、富有创造力，随时准备冒险。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Sugar_Bombs_Priz: 赢得糖弹比赛并获得一年的谷物食品供应。成为邻居羡慕的对象，并学会了分享（和交易）零食的艺术。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Super_Duper_Mart: 周末在当地的 Super Duper Mart 帮忙，整理货架并问候顾客。懂得了努力工作和友好微笑的价值。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Vault_Tec_Lotter: 练习“躲避和掩护”训练并梦想住在避难所里。阅读每一本避难所科技漫画并相信每一个广告。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Vault_Tec_Scienc: 加入 Vault-Tec 科学俱乐部，建造模型 Vault 并学习原子能。好奇心强、富有创造力，总是渴望尝试。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Chryslus_Assem: 在 Chryslus 装配线上制造融合动力汽车，梦想着驾驶一辆樱桃红色的拦路强盗。了解机械的嗡嗡声和美国工程的自豪感。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_College_Studen: 在一所著名大学学习工程和核物理，希望能在 Vault-Tec 或 RobCo 找到一份工作。学得很快，但对课堂外的世界有点天真。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Doctor.descrip: 在一家闪闪发光的战前医院行医，使用最新的 Rad-X 和针剂。致力于保持家庭健康并为未来做好准备。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Doctor.title: 原子时代医生
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Giddy_up_Butte: 在 Giddyup Buttercup 工厂组装玩具马，梦想着为美国的孩子们创造更光明的未来。了解大规模生产的细节以及新鲜塑料的气味。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Homemaker.desc: 在值得信赖的汉迪先生的帮助下，房子一尘不染，一家人吃饱了。梦想赢得年度核子可乐抽奖并在避难所度假。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Hubris_Comics_: 为野蛮人格格纳克和势不可挡者撰写狂野冒险故事。糖弹和深夜广播连续剧激发了想象力。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Nuka_Cola_Sale: S老旧 the world’s favorite soft drink door-to-door, always with a smile and a catchy jingle. Knows every flavor and every 秘密 recipe rumor.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Nuka_World_Ent: 在核子世界表演，用魔术和歌曲让观众眼花缭乱。知道如何让观众保持微笑——即使电源闪烁。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Police.descrip: 驾驶经典巡洋舰在街道上巡逻，维持治安并监视共产党间谍。受过调查、谈判和指挥棒艺术方面的训练。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Police.title: 警官
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Poseidon_Energ: 维护波塞冬能源公司的反应堆和电网。知道如何处理扳手、电压表和意外的蟑螂侵扰。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Radio_News_Anc: 通过广播提供最新的头条新闻和政府公报。在压力下保持冷静，发出数百万人信任的声音——至少在警报响起之前是这样。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Red_Menace_Pro: 撰写激动人心的演讲和小册子，警告共产党的威胁。朗朗上口的口号和戏剧性的天赋，时刻准备着团结公众。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Red_Menace_Voi: 在红色威胁卡通节目中生动地呈现了英雄和恶棍。擅长戏剧表演、模仿以及让孩子们粘在电视机上。
红色威胁卡通配音演员
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Red_Rocket_Att: 在当地的红色火箭站抽气并修理汽车。方便使用扳手，随时准备谈论最新的聚变动力车辆。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Red_Rocket_Gre: Spent days tuning up fusion engines and waxing chrome at Red Rocket. Knows every bolt and gasket in a Chryslus Highwayman, and can swap a fusion core blindf老旧ed.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_RedMenace_Arti: 为《红色威胁》漫画系列绘制了面板，描绘了对抗共产主义威胁的英雄。富有想象力，爱国，并且总是准备好诙谐的俏皮话。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_RobCo_Technici: 在 RobCo 工厂上夜班，修理 Protectrons 和 Mister Handys。了解电路板和咖啡机。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Silver_Shroud_: 主持《银色裹尸布》广播节目，用正义和阴谋的故事让听众激动不已。魅力非凡、机智敏捷，随时准备着戏剧性的独白。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Suburban_Garde: 在郊区维护了原始的草坪和菜园，赢得了当地最佳西红柿奖。知道如何从土壤中培育生命——即使土壤受到了一点辐射。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Suburban_Scout: 带领邻里侦察部队进行露营、急救和原子安全演习。知道如何打结、搭帐篷以及在空袭警报响起时让孩子们保持冷静。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Super_Duper_Ma: Rang up groceries and restocked shelves at Super Duper Mart. Knows the price of every snack cake and the 秘密 to surviving a rush of hungry shoppers.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Teacher.descri: 教导孩子们科学的奇迹和共产主义的危险。领导“躲避和掩护”演习并发放糖弹作为奖励。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Teacher.title: 小学老师
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Vault_Dweller_: 花了数年时间参加 Vault-Tec 抽签，希望能在闪亮的新避难所中占据一席之地。阅读每本小册子并认真地进行“躲避和掩护”练习。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Vault_Tec_Acco: Kept the books for Vault-Tec, tracking every cap and credit. Knew the value of a dollar and the 秘密s behind the company’s mysterious projects.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Vault_Tec_PR_S: 为 Vault-Tec 制作欢快的广告和令人放心的新闻稿，让公众相信一切都在掌控之中。不确定时期的旋转和乐观大师。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_President_Richardson_L: 凭借个人魅力和坚定不移的信念，在政府中晋升为总统。致力于恢复美国昔日辉煌的梦想，不惜一切代价。修辞和政治操纵的大师。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Secret_Service_Agent.d: Selected from among the nation's finest law enforcement personnel, this agent was trained in presidential protection, counterterrorism, and threat assessment. Their duties demanded constant vigilance, split-second decision-making, and the willingness to take a bullet for their assigned protectee. C老旧 professionalism defined their every action.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Secret_Service_T65_Ope: Handpicked from the 秘密 Service's most elite agents, this operative was trained to pilot the experimental T-65 power armor. Their missions involved critical national security operations that required overwhelming force and absolute discretion. Only the best of the best ever saw the inside of a T-65 suit, and they were expected to succeed where entire platoons would fail.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USMC_Marine_Demolitions.de: 这位海军陆战队员是爆炸物和突破行动方面的专家，负责清除障碍和破坏敌方阵地。他们的技术技能和钢铁般的意志在高风险任务中至关重要。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USMC_Marine_Demolitions.ti: 美国海军陆战队爆破专家
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USMC_Marine_Rifleman.descr: 曾在美国海军陆战队担任步枪手，接受过两栖攻击和近距离格斗训练。以纪律、适应能力和战火中的勇气而闻名。
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USMC_Marine_Rifleman.title: 美国海军陆战队步枪兵
美国海军陆战队
Issued an experimental prototype of submersible Marine armor aboard the USS Democracy, this Marine kept watch within the boat’s tight corridors and led boarding and security operations below the waves. Hardened by claustrophobic sea duty and brutal close-quarters combat, they relied on the armor’s plating and specialized systems to repel raiders, lead boarding parties, and carry out 危险 missions along irradiated coastal and underwater sites.
